1→     1→     1→"""Profile extraction module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→Extracts candidate profile information from Boss直聘.
     4→     4→     4→
     5→     5→     5→CRITICAL LIMITATION (verified 2026-03-03):
     6→     6→     6→Profile details in the resume overlay are wasm-rendered — the DOM inside
     7→     7→     7→.resume-detail-wrap is empty. We CANNOT extract detailed resume via DOM.
     8→     8→     8→
     9→     9→     9→Profile data sources:
    10→    10→    10→1. Search card data (from searchFrame iframe) — best source for basic info
    11→    11→    11→2. Resume overlay header/footer — job position, contact status
    12→    12→    12→3. Chat page conversation — limited info
    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→The extract_profile function now primarily uses search card data
    15→    15→    15→and supplements with whatever is available from the resume overlay.
    16→    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    19→    19→    19→
    20→    20→    20→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    21→    21→    21→from loguru import logger
    22→    22→    22→from rich.console import Console
    23→    23→    23→from rich.panel import Panel
    24→    24→    24→
    25→    25→    25→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    26→    26→    26→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    27→    27→    27→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    28→    28→    28→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    29→    29→    29→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    30→    30→    30→from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    31→    31→    31→from src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    32→    32→    32→
    33→    33→    33→console = Console()
    34→    34→    34→
    35→    35→    35→
    36→    36→    36→# JavaScript extraction for candidate profile from search card (inside searchFrame iframe).
    37→    37→    37→# This extracts all available data from the card since resume detail is wasm-rendered.
    38→    38→    38→EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS = """
    39→    39→    39→(expectId) => {
    40→    40→    40→    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
    41→    41→    41→    if (!link) return null;
    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
    44→    44→    44→    if (!card) return null;
    45→    45→    45→
    46→    46→    46→    const result = {
    47→    47→    47→        name: '',
    48→    48→    48→        title: '',
    49→    49→    49→        company: '',
    50→    50→    50→        location: '',
    51→    51→    51→        salary_expect: '',
    52→    52→    52→        work_years: '',
    53→    53→    53→        education_level: '',
    54→    54→    54→        basic_info: {},
    55→    55→    55→        education: [],
    56→    56→    56→        work_experience: [],
    57→    57→    57→        skills: []
    58→    58→    58→    };
    59→    59→    59→
    60→    60→    60→    // Name
    61→    61→    61→    const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
    62→    62→    62→    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63→    63→    63→
    64→    64→    64→    // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
    65→    65→    65→    const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
    66→    66→    66→    const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→    for (const text of infoTexts) {
    69→    69→    69→        if (text.includes('岁')) {
    70→    70→    70→            result.basic_info.age = text;
    71→    71→    71→        } else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) {
    72→    72→    72→            result.work_years = text;
    73→    73→    73→            result.basic_info.work_years = text;
    74→    74→    74→        } else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) {
    75→    75→    75→            result.education_level = text;
    76→    76→    76→            result.basic_info.education = text;
    77→    77→    77→        } else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) {
    78→    78→    78→            result.basic_info.job_status = text;
    79→    79→    79→        } else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k')) {
    80→    80→    80→            result.salary_expect = text;
    81→    81→    81→        }
    82→    82→    82→    }
    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    // Active status
    85→    85→    85→    const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
    86→    86→    86→    if (activeEl) result.basic_info.active_status = activeEl.innerText.trim();
    87→    87→    87→
    88→    88→    88→    // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
    89→    89→    89→    const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
    90→    90→    90→    result.basic_info.labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    91→    91→    91→
    92→    92→    92→    // Self description
    93→    93→    93→    const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
    94→    94→    94→    if (detailEl) result.basic_info.self_description = detailEl.innerText.trim();
    95→    95→    95→
    96→    96→    96→    // Expect city
    97→    97→    97→    const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
    98→    98→    98→    result.location = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    99→    99→    99→
   100→   100→   100→    // Work experience
   101→   101→   101→    const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   102→   102→   102→    const workTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   103→   103→   103→    if (workTexts.length >= 1) {
   104→   104→   104→        result.company = workTexts[0];
   105→   105→   105→        result.title = workTexts[1] || '';
   106→   106→   106→        result.work_experience.push({
   107→   107→   107→            company: workTexts[0],
   108→   108→   108→            title: workTexts[1] || ''
   109→   109→   109→        });
   110→   110→   110→    }
   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→    // Education
   113→   113→   113→    const eduEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   114→   114→   114→    const eduTexts = Array.from(eduEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   115→   115→   115→    if (eduTexts.length >= 1) {
   116→   116→   116→        result.education.push({
   117→   117→   117→            school: eduTexts[0],
   118→   118→   118→            major: eduTexts[1] || ''
   119→   119→   119→        });
   120→   120→   120→    }
   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→    // Elite flag
   123→   123→   123→    result.basic_info.is_elite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→    return result;
   126→   126→   126→}
   127→   127→   127→"""
   128→   128→   128→
   129→   129→   129→
   130→   130→   130→# JavaScript extraction for resume overlay (main page DOM).
   131→   131→   131→# Limited data since resume content is wasm-rendered.
   132→   132→   132→EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS = """
   133→   133→   133→() => {
   134→   134→   134→    const dialog = document.querySelector('.dialog-wrap.active .dialog-lib-resume');
   135→   135→   135→    if (!dialog) return null;
   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→    const result = {};
   138→   138→   138→
   139→   139→   139→    // Position info from footer
   140→   140→   140→    const positionEl = dialog.querySelector('.position-name');
   141→   141→   141→    if (positionEl) result.chat_position = positionEl.innerText.trim();
   142→   142→   142→
   143→   143→   143→    // Chat history from right panel
   144→   144→   144→    const historyEls = dialog.querySelectorAll('.chat-history-process .action');
   145→   145→   145→    result.chat_history = Array.from(historyEls).slice(0, 5).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   146→   146→   146→
   147→   147→   147→    // Contact button text
   148→   148→   148→    const contactBtn = dialog.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   149→   149→   149→    if (contactBtn) result.contact_status = contactBtn.innerText.trim();
   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→    return result;
   152→   152→   152→}
   153→   153→   153→"""
   154→   154→   154→
   155→   155→   155→
   156→   156→   156→async def extract_profile(
   157→   157→   157→    boss_id: str,
   158→   158→   158→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   159→   159→   159→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   160→   160→   160→    """
   161→   161→   161→    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   162→   162→   162→
   163→   163→   163→    Uses search card data as the primary source since the resume
   164→   164→   164→    overlay is wasm-rendered and has empty DOM.
   165→   165→   165→
   166→   166→   166→    Args:
   167→   167→   167→        boss_id: Boss直聘 candidate ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   168→   168→   168→        browser: Browser manager instance
   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→    Returns:
   171→   171→   171→        Dictionary with profile data
   172→   172→   172→
   173→   173→   173→    Raises:
   174→   174→   174→        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   175→   175→   175→    """
   176→   176→   176→    if browser is None:
   177→   177→   177→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   178→   178→   178→
   179→   179→   179→    page = browser.page
   180→   180→   180→    if not page:
   181→   181→   181→        page = await browser.start()
   182→   182→   182→
   183→   183→   183→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   184→   184→   184→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   185→   185→   185→
   186→   186→   186→    # Rate limit check
   187→   187→   187→    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   188→   188→   188→
   189→   189→   189→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→    try:
   192→   192→   192→        profile_data = None
   193→   193→   193→
   194→   194→   194→        # Strategy 1: Extract from search card in iframe (best source)
   195→   195→   195→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   196→   196→   196→        if not search_frame:
   197→   197→   197→            for f in page.frames:
   198→   198→   198→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   199→   199→   199→                    search_frame = f
   200→   200→   200→                    break
   201→   201→   201→
   202→   202→   202→        if search_frame:
   203→   203→   203→            profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   204→   204→   204→
   205→   205→   205→        # Strategy 2: If not on search page, navigate there
   206→   206→   206→        if not profile_data:
   207→   207→   207→            await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   208→   208→   208→                                   wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   209→   209→   209→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   210→   210→   210→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→            search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   213→   213→   213→            if not search_frame:
   214→   214→   214→                for f in page.frames:
   215→   215→   215→                    if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   216→   216→   216→                        search_frame = f
   217→   217→   217→                        break
   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→            if search_frame:
   220→   220→   220→                profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   221→   221→   221→
   222→   222→   222→        # Strategy 3: Use database data as fallback
   223→   223→   223→        if not profile_data:
   224→   224→   224→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   225→   225→   225→                candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   226→   226→   226→                if candidate:
   227→   227→   227→                    profile_data = {
   228→   228→   228→                        'name': candidate.name or '',
   229→   229→   229→                        'title': candidate.title or '',
   230→   230→   230→                        'company': candidate.company or '',
   231→   231→   231→                        'location': candidate.location or '',
   232→   232→   232→                        'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect or '',
   233→   233→   233→                        'work_years': candidate.work_years or '',
   234→   234→   234→                        'education_level': candidate.education_level or '',
   235→   235→   235→                        'basic_info': candidate.basic_info or {},
   236→   236→   236→                        'education': candidate.education or [],
   237→   237→   237→                        'work_experience': candidate.work_experience or [],
   238→   238→   238→                        'skills': candidate.skills or [],
   239→   239→   239→                    }
   240→   240→   240→
   241→   241→   241→        if not profile_data:
   242→   242→   242→            raise ExtractionError(f"No profile data found for {boss_id}")
   243→   243→   243→
   244→   244→   244→        # Try to supplement with overlay data (if resume dialog is open)
   245→   245→   245→        try:
   246→   246→   246→            overlay_data = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS)
   247→   247→   247→            if overlay_data:
   248→   248→   248→                profile_data.setdefault('basic_info', {})
   249→   249→   249→                if overlay_data.get('chat_position'):
   250→   250→   250→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_position'] = overlay_data['chat_position']
   251→   251→   251→                if overlay_data.get('contact_status'):
   252→   252→   252→                    profile_data['basic_info']['contact_status'] = overlay_data['contact_status']
   253→   253→   253→                if overlay_data.get('chat_history'):
   254→   254→   254→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_history'] = overlay_data['chat_history']
   255→   255→   255→        except Exception:
   256→   256→   256→            pass  # Overlay data is supplementary, not critical
   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→        # Log action
   259→   259→   259→        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   260→   260→   260→
   261→   261→   261→        # Update database
   262→   262→   262→        _update_profile_in_db(boss_id, profile_data, db_manager)
   263→   263→   263→
   264→   264→   264→        # Display profile
   265→   265→   265→        _display_profile(boss_id, profile_data)
   266→   266→   266→
   267→   267→   267→        return profile_data
   268→   268→   268→
   269→   269→   269→    except ExtractionError:
   270→   270→   270→        raise
   271→   271→   271→    except Exception as e:
   272→   272→   272→        logger.error(f"Error extracting profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   273→   273→   273→        raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   274→   274→   274→
   275→   275→   275→
   276→   276→   276→def _update_profile_in_db(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict, db_manager) -> None:
   277→   277→   277→    """Update candidate profile in the database."""
   278→   278→   278→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   279→   279→   279→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   280→   280→   280→
   281→   281→   281→        if not candidate:
   282→   282→   282→            candidate = Candidate(boss_id=boss_id)
   283→   283→   283→            session.add(candidate)
   284→   284→   284→
   285→   285→   285→        # Update fields
   286→   286→   286→        candidate.name = profile_data.get('name') or candidate.name
   287→   287→   287→        candidate.title = profile_data.get('title') or candidate.title
   288→   288→   288→        candidate.company = profile_data.get('company') or candidate.company
   289→   289→   289→        candidate.location = profile_data.get('location') or candidate.location
   290→   290→   290→        candidate.salary_expect = profile_data.get('salary_expect') or candidate.salary_expect
   291→   291→   291→        candidate.work_years = profile_data.get('work_years') or candidate.work_years
   292→   292→   292→        candidate.education_level = profile_data.get('education_level') or candidate.education_level
   293→   293→   293→        candidate.basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info')
   294→   294→   294→        candidate.education = profile_data.get('education')
   295→   295→   295→        candidate.work_experience = profile_data.get('work_experience')
   296→   296→   296→        candidate.skills = profile_data.get('skills')
   297→   297→   297→
   298→   298→   298→
   299→   299→   299→def _display_profile(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict) -> None:
   300→   300→   300→    """Display extracted profile in Rich format."""
   301→   301→   301→    name = profile_data.get('name', 'Unknown')
   302→   302→   302→    title = profile_data.get('title', '')
   303→   303→   303→    company = profile_data.get('company', '')
   304→   304→   304→    location = profile_data.get('location', '')
   305→   305→   305→    salary = profile_data.get('salary_expect', '')
   306→   306→   306→    work_years = profile_data.get('work_years', '')
   307→   307→   307→    education_level = profile_data.get('education_level', '')
   308→   308→   308→
   309→   309→   309→    # Header
   310→   310→   310→    header = f"[bold]{name}[/bold]"
   311→   311→   311→    if title:
   312→   312→   312→        header += f" - {title}"
   313→   313→   313→    if company:
   314→   314→   314→        header += f" @ {company}"
   315→   315→   315→
   316→   316→   316→    console.print(Panel(header, title=f"Profile: {boss_id}", border_style="green"))
   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→    # Basic info
   319→   319→   319→    info_parts = []
   320→   320→   320→    if location:
   321→   321→   321→        info_parts.append(f"Location: {location}")
   322→   322→   322→    if salary:
   323→   323→   323→        info_parts.append(f"Expected Salary: {salary}")
   324→   324→   324→    if work_years:
   325→   325→   325→        info_parts.append(f"Experience: {work_years}")
   326→   326→   326→    if education_level:
   327→   327→   327→        info_parts.append(f"Education: {education_level}")
   328→   328→   328→
   329→   329→   329→    basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info', {})
   330→   330→   330→    if basic_info.get('age'):
   331→   331→   331→        info_parts.append(f"Age: {basic_info['age']}")
   332→   332→   332→    if basic_info.get('job_status'):
   333→   333→   333→        info_parts.append(f"Status: {basic_info['job_status']}")
   334→   334→   334→    if basic_info.get('active_status'):
   335→   335→   335→        info_parts.append(f"Active: {basic_info['active_status']}")
   336→   336→   336→
   337→   337→   337→    if info_parts:
   338→   338→   338→        console.print("  " + " | ".join(info_parts))
   339→   339→   339→
   340→   340→   340→    # Education
   341→   341→   341→    education = profile_data.get('education', [])
   342→   342→   342→    if education:
   343→   343→   343→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Education:[/cyan]")
   344→   344→   344→        for edu in education:
   345→   345→   345→            parts = []
   346→   346→   346→            if edu.get('school'):
   347→   347→   347→                parts.append(edu['school'])
   348→   348→   348→            if edu.get('degree'):
   349→   349→   349→                parts.append(edu['degree'])
   350→   350→   350→            if edu.get('major'):
   351→   351→   351→                parts.append(edu['major'])
   352→   352→   352→            console.print(f"    - {' | '.join(parts)}")
   353→   353→   353→
   354→   354→   354→    # Work experience
   355→   355→   355→    work_exp = profile_data.get('work_experience', [])
   356→   356→   356→    if work_exp:
   357→   357→   357→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Work Experience:[/cyan]")
   358→   358→   358→        for work in work_exp:
   359→   359→   359→            line = ""
   360→   360→   360→            if work.get('company'):
   361→   361→   361→                line += work['company']
   362→   362→   362→            if work.get('title'):
   363→   363→   363→                line += f" - {work['title']}"
   364→   364→   364→            if work.get('period'):
   365→   365→   365→                line += f" ({work['period']})"
   366→   366→   366→            console.print(f"    - {line}")
   367→   367→   367→
   368→   368→   368→    # Skills
   369→   369→   369→    skills = profile_data.get('skills', [])
   370→   370→   370→    if skills:
   371→   371→   371→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Skills:[/cyan] {', '.join(skills)}")
   372→   372→   372→
   373→   373→   373→    # Self description
   374→   374→   374→    if basic_info.get('self_description'):
   375→   375→   375→        desc = basic_info['self_description'][:200]
   376→   376→   376→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Self Description:[/cyan]\n    {desc}")
   377→   377→   377→
   378→   378→   378→    console.print()
   379→   379→   379→

1→     1→"""Dashboard route — GET /"""
     2→     2→
     3→     3→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     4→     4→
     5→     5→from fastapi import APIRouter, Request
     6→     6→
     7→     7→from src.web.app import chrome_manager, task_queue, templates
     8→     8→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
     9→     9→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
    10→    10→
    11→    11→router = APIRouter()
    12→    12→
    13→    13→
    14→    14→@router.get("/")
    15→    15→async def dashboard(request: Request):
    16→    16→    """Main dashboard with status overview and today's stats."""
    17→    17→    db = get_db_manager()
    18→    18→    today_start = datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
    19→    19→
    20→    20→    with db.session_scope() as session:
    21→    21→        total_candidates = session.query(Candidate).count()
    22→    22→        total_messages_sent = session.query(Message).filter(Message.status == 'sent').count()
    23→    23→        today_searches = session.query(SearchHistory).filter(
    24→    24→            SearchHistory.executed_at >= today_start
    25→    25→        ).count()
    26→    26→        today_messages = session.query(Message).filter(
    27→    27→            Message.created_at >= today_start,
    28→    28→            Message.status == 'sent',
    29→    29→        ).count()
    30→    30→
    31→    31→    # Chrome status
    32→    32→    chrome_healthy = await chrome_manager._check_cdp_health()
    33→    33→
    34→    34→    # Pipeline status
    35→    35→    pipeline_busy = task_queue.is_busy
    36→    36→    pipeline_task_id = task_queue.current_task_id
    37→    37→
    38→    38→    # Rate limiter status
    39→    39→    try:
    40→    40→        rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    41→    41→        throttle = rate_limiter.throttle_factor
    42→    42→    except Exception:
    43→    43→        throttle = 1.0
    44→    44→
    45→    45→    return templates.TemplateResponse("dashboard.html", {
    46→    46→        "request": request,
    47→    47→        "chrome_healthy": chrome_healthy,
    48→    48→        "pipeline_busy": pipeline_busy,
    49→    49→        "pipeline_task_id": pipeline_task_id,
    50→    50→        "total_candidates": total_candidates,
    51→    51→        "total_messages_sent": total_messages_sent,
    52→    52→        "today_searches": today_searches,
    53→    53→        "today_messages": today_messages,
    54→    54→        "throttle_factor": throttle,
    55→    55→    })
    56→    56→

1→     1→     1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages.
     4→     4→     4→Search page: /web/chat/search — candidates are inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
     5→     5→     5→
     6→     6→     6→CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE NOTE:
     7→     7→     7→The search results live inside an iframe (searchFrame), NOT the main page DOM.
     8→     8→     8→All evaluate() calls must target the iframe frame, not page directly.
     9→     9→     9→Search uses "换一换" button to refresh results, not infinite scroll.
    10→    10→    10→Candidate IDs come from data-expect attribute on card links.
    11→    11→    11→"""
    12→    12→    12→
    13→    13→    13→import hashlib
    14→    14→    14→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    15→    15→    15→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    16→    16→    16→
    17→    17→    17→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    18→    18→    18→from loguru import logger
    19→    19→    19→from rich.console import Console
    20→    20→    20→from rich.table import Table
    21→    21→    21→
    22→    22→    22→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    23→    23→    23→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    24→    24→    24→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    25→    25→    25→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    26→    26→    26→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    27→    27→    27→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    28→    28→    28→console = Console()
    29→    29→    29→
    30→    30→    30→
    31→    31→    31→@dataclass
    32→    32→    32→class CandidateBasic:
    33→    33→    33→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    34→    34→    34→    boss_id: str
    35→    35→    35→    name: str
    36→    36→    36→    title: str
    37→    37→    37→    company: str
    38→    38→    38→    location: Optional[str] = None
    39→    39→    39→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    40→    40→    40→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    41→    41→    41→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    42→    42→    42→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    43→    43→    43→    active_status: Optional[str] = None
    44→    44→    44→    school: Optional[str] = None
    45→    45→    45→    major: Optional[str] = None
    46→    46→    46→    job_status: Optional[str] = None
    47→    47→    47→    self_desc: Optional[str] = None
    48→    48→    48→    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    49→    49→    49→
    50→    50→    50→    def __hash__(self):
    51→    51→    51→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    52→    52→    52→
    53→    53→    53→    def __eq__(self, other):
    54→    54→    54→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    55→    55→    55→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    56→    56→    56→        return False
    57→    57→    57→
    58→    58→    58→
    59→    59→    59→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    60→    60→    60→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    61→    61→    61→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    62→    62→    62→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    63→    63→    63→}
    64→    64→    64→
    65→    65→    65→
    66→    66→    66→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    67→    67→    67→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    68→    68→    68→    if not title:
    69→    69→    69→        return False
    70→    70→    70→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    71→    71→    71→        if keyword in title:
    72→    72→    72→            return True
    73→    73→    73→    return False
    74→    74→    74→
    75→    75→    75→
    76→    76→    76→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    77→    77→    77→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash."""
    78→    78→    78→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    79→    79→    79→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    80→    80→    80→    return f"zp_{h}"
    81→    81→    81→
    82→    82→    82→
    83→    83→    83→async def _get_search_frame(page: Page) -> Optional[Frame]:
    84→    84→    84→    """Get the searchFrame iframe from the main page.
    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→    Boss直聘 search page loads candidates inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
    87→    87→    87→    Returns the Frame object for executing JS inside the iframe.
    88→    88→    88→    """
    89→    89→    89→    frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
    90→    90→    90→    if frame:
    91→    91→    91→        return frame
    92→    92→    92→
    93→    93→    93→    # Fallback: find by URL pattern
    94→    94→    94→    for f in page.frames:
    95→    95→    95→        if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
    96→    96→    96→            return f
    97→    97→    97→
    98→    98→    98→    return None
    99→    99→    99→
   100→   100→   100→
   101→   101→   101→# JavaScript extraction for candidates inside searchFrame iframe.
   102→   102→   102→# Targets: div.card-list > li.geek-info-card > a[data-expect]
   103→   103→   103→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
   104→   104→   104→() => {
   105→   105→   105→    const candidates = [];
   106→   106→   106→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.card-list .geek-info-card');
   107→   107→   107→
   108→   108→   108→    for (const card of cards) {
   109→   109→   109→        try {
   110→   110→   110→            const link = card.querySelector('a');
   111→   111→   111→            if (!link) continue;
   112→   112→   112→
   113→   113→   113→            // Candidate ID from data-expect attribute
   114→   114→   114→            const expectId = link.dataset.expect || '';
   115→   115→   115→            if (!expectId) continue;
   116→   116→   116→
   117→   117→   117→            const bossId = 'zp_' + expectId;
   118→   118→   118→
   119→   119→   119→            // Name (anonymized, e.g. "卿**")
   120→   120→   120→            const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
   121→   121→   121→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   122→   122→   122→            if (!name) continue;
   123→   123→   123→
   124→   124→   124→            // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
   125→   125→   125→            const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
   126→   126→   126→            const labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→            // Active status (e.g. "3日内活跃")
   129→   129→   129→            const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
   130→   130→   130→            const activeStatus = activeEl ? activeEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   131→   131→   131→
   132→   132→   132→            // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
   133→   133→   133→            const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
   134→   134→   134→            const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   135→   135→   135→
   136→   136→   136→            let age = '', workYears = '', education = '', jobStatus = '', salary = '';
   137→   137→   137→            for (const text of infoTexts) {
   138→   138→   138→                if (text.includes('岁')) age = text;
   139→   139→   139→                else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) workYears = text;
   140→   140→   140→                else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) education = text;
   141→   141→   141→                else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) jobStatus = text;
   142→   142→   142→                else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k') || text.includes('薪')) salary = text;
   143→   143→   143→            }
   144→   144→   144→
   145→   145→   145→            // Self description / detail
   146→   146→   146→            const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
   147→   147→   147→            const selfDesc = detailEl ? detailEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   148→   148→   148→
   149→   149→   149→            // Expect city
   150→   150→   150→            const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   151→   151→   151→            const expectCity = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
   152→   152→   152→
   153→   153→   153→            // Work experience (company + title)
   154→   154→   154→            const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   155→   155→   155→            const workExpTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   156→   156→   156→            const company = workExpTexts[0] || '';
   157→   157→   157→            const title = workExpTexts[1] || '';
   158→   158→   158→
   159→   159→   159→            // Education (school + major)
   160→   160→   160→            const eduExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   161→   161→   161→            const eduTexts = Array.from(eduExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   162→   162→   162→            const school = eduTexts[0] || '';
   163→   163→   163→            const major = eduTexts[1] || '';
   164→   164→   164→
   165→   165→   165→            // Contact button status
   166→   166→   166→            const contactBtn = card.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   167→   167→   167→            const contactText = contactBtn ? contactBtn.innerText.trim() : '';
   168→   168→   168→
   169→   169→   169→            // Elite/hot candidate flag
   170→   170→   170→            const isElite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   171→   171→   171→
   172→   172→   172→            candidates.push({
   173→   173→   173→                boss_id: bossId,
   174→   174→   174→                name: name,
   175→   175→   175→                title: title,
   176→   176→   176→                company: company,
   177→   177→   177→                location: expectCity,
   178→   178→   178→                salary_expect: salary,
   179→   179→   179→                work_years: workYears,
   180→   180→   180→                education_level: education,
   181→   181→   181→                active_status: activeStatus,
   182→   182→   182→                school: school,
   183→   183→   183→                major: major,
   184→   184→   184→                job_status: jobStatus,
   185→   185→   185→                self_desc: selfDesc,
   186→   186→   186→                age: age,
   187→   187→   187→                labels: labels,
   188→   188→   188→                is_elite: isElite,
   189→   189→   189→                contact_text: contactText,
   190→   190→   190→                profile_url: ''
   191→   191→   191→            });
   192→   192→   192→        } catch (e) {
   193→   193→   193→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   194→   194→   194→        }
   195→   195→   195→    }
   196→   196→   196→
   197→   197→   197→    return candidates;
   198→   198→   198→}
   199→   199→   199→"""
   200→   200→   200→
   201→   201→   201→
   202→   202→   202→async def search_candidates(
   203→   203→   203→    keywords: List[str],
   204→   204→   204→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   205→   205→   205→    max_pages: int = 1,
   206→   206→   206→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   207→   207→   207→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   208→   208→   208→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   209→   209→   209→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   210→   210→   210→    start_page: int = 1,
   211→   211→   211→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   212→   212→   212→    """
   213→   213→   213→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   214→   214→   214→
   215→   215→   215→    Navigates to search page, types keyword in iframe search input,
   216→   216→   216→    extracts candidates from card list, and optionally refreshes
   217→   217→   217→    via "换一换" button for more results.
   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→    Args:
   220→   220→   220→        keywords: List of search keywords
   221→   221→   221→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   222→   222→   222→        max_pages: Number of "换一换" refresh rounds per keyword
   223→   223→   223→        experience: Experience filter
   224→   224→   224→        education: Education filter
   225→   225→   225→        salary: Salary filter
   226→   226→   226→        browser: Browser manager instance
   227→   227→   227→        start_page: Starting refresh round (for resume)
   228→   228→   228→
   229→   229→   229→    Returns:
   230→   230→   230→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   231→   231→   231→    """
   232→   232→   232→    if browser is None:
   233→   233→   233→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   234→   234→   234→
   235→   235→   235→    page = browser.page
   236→   236→   236→    if not page:
   237→   237→   237→        page = await browser.start()
   238→   238→   238→
   239→   239→   239→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   240→   240→   240→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   241→   241→   241→
   242→   242→   242→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   243→   243→   243→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   244→   244→   244→    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   245→   245→   245→
   246→   246→   246→    for keyword in keywords:
   247→   247→   247→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   248→   248→   248→
   249→   249→   249→        # Rate limit check
   250→   250→   250→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   251→   251→   251→
   252→   252→   252→        try:
   253→   253→   253→            # Navigate to search page (main page, iframe will load)
   254→   254→   254→            search_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   255→   255→   255→            await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   256→   256→   256→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→            # Check for captcha on main page
   259→   259→   259→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   260→   260→   260→
   261→   261→   261→            # Get the search iframe
   262→   262→   262→            search_frame = await _get_search_frame(page)
   263→   263→   263→            if not search_frame:
   264→   264→   264→                logger.error("Could not find searchFrame iframe")
   265→   265→   265→                console.print("[red]Search iframe not found. Page structure may have changed.[/red]")
   266→   266→   266→                continue
   267→   267→   267→
   268→   268→   268→            # Wait for search input to be ready inside iframe
   269→   269→   269→            try:
   270→   270→   270→                await search_frame.wait_for_selector('input.search-input', timeout=10000)
   271→   271→   271→            except Exception:
   272→   272→   272→                logger.error("Search input not found in iframe")
   273→   273→   273→                continue
   274→   274→   274→
   275→   275→   275→            # Type keyword in search input
   276→   276→   276→            search_input = await search_frame.query_selector('input.search-input')
   277→   277→   277→            if search_input:
   278→   278→   278→                await search_input.click()
   279→   279→   279→                await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   280→   280→   280→                # Clear and type
   281→   281→   281→                import sys
   282→   282→   282→                select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   283→   283→   283→                await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   284→   284→   284→                await search_input.fill(keyword)
   285→   285→   285→                await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
   286→   286→   286→                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   287→   287→   287→            else:
   288→   288→   288→                logger.error("Search input element not found")
   289→   289→   289→                continue
   290→   290→   290→
   291→   291→   291→            # Wait for card list to appear
   292→   292→   292→            try:
   293→   293→   293→                await search_frame.wait_for_selector('.card-list .geek-info-card', timeout=15000)
   294→   294→   294→            except Exception:
   295→   295→   295→                logger.warning(f"No candidate cards loaded for '{keyword}'")
   296→   296→   296→                continue
   297→   297→   297→
   298→   298→   298→            # Check for quota exhaustion
   299→   299→   299→            if await _check_quota_exhausted(search_frame):
   300→   300→   300→                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   301→   301→   301→                break
   302→   302→   302→
   303→   303→   303→            # Extract candidates from current results + refresh rounds
   304→   304→   304→            total_rounds = start_page + max_pages - 1
   305→   305→   305→            for refresh_round in range(start_page, total_rounds + 1):
   306→   306→   306→                if refresh_round > start_page:
   307→   307→   307→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Refresh round {refresh_round}/{total_rounds} (换一换)...[/dim]")
   308→   308→   308→                    await _refresh_search_results(search_frame)
   309→   309→   309→                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   310→   310→   310→
   311→   311→   311→                # Extract candidates from current card list
   312→   312→   312→                raw_candidates = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   313→   313→   313→
   314→   314→   314→                if not raw_candidates:
   315→   315→   315→                    logger.warning(f"No candidates found in round {refresh_round} for '{keyword}'")
   316→   316→   316→                    continue
   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→                # Process results
   319→   319→   319→                round_count = 0
   320→   320→   320→                for raw in raw_candidates:
   321→   321→   321→                    name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   322→   322→   322→                    title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   323→   323→   323→                    company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   324→   324→   324→
   325→   325→   325→                    if not name:
   326→   326→   326→                        continue
   327→   327→   327→
   328→   328→   328→                    # Filter non-R&D roles
   329→   329→   329→                    if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   330→   330→   330→                        continue
   331→   331→   331→
   332→   332→   332→                    # Use boss_id from data-expect
   333→   333→   333→                    boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   334→   334→   334→                    if not boss_id:
   335→   335→   335→                        boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   336→   336→   336→
   337→   337→   337→                    # Deduplicate
   338→   338→   338→                    if boss_id in seen_ids:
   339→   339→   339→                        continue
   340→   340→   340→
   341→   341→   341→                    dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   342→   342→   342→                    if dedup_key in seen_dedup_keys:
   343→   343→   343→                        continue
   344→   344→   344→
   345→   345→   345→                    seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   346→   346→   346→                    seen_dedup_keys.add(dedup_key)
   347→   347→   347→
   348→   348→   348→                    candidate = CandidateBasic(
   349→   349→   349→                        boss_id=boss_id,
   350→   350→   350→                        name=name,
   351→   351→   351→                        title=title,
   352→   352→   352→                        company=company,
   353→   353→   353→                        location=raw.get('location', ''),
   354→   354→   354→                        salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   355→   355→   355→                        work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   356→   356→   356→                        education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   357→   357→   357→                        profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   358→   358→   358→                        active_status=raw.get('active_status', ''),
   359→   359→   359→                        school=raw.get('school', ''),
   360→   360→   360→                        major=raw.get('major', ''),
   361→   361→   361→                        job_status=raw.get('job_status', ''),
   362→   362→   362→                        self_desc=raw.get('self_desc', ''),
   363→   363→   363→                    )
   364→   364→   364→
   365→   365→   365→                    all_candidates.append(candidate)
   366→   366→   366→                    round_count += 1
   367→   367→   367→
   368→   368→   368→                console.print(f"  [green]Round {refresh_round}: {round_count} new candidates[/green]")
   369→   369→   369→
   370→   370→   370→            # Log action
   371→   371→   371→            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   372→   372→   372→                'keyword': keyword,
   373→   373→   373→                'refresh_rounds': max_pages,
   374→   374→   374→                'results': len([c for c in all_candidates]),
   375→   375→   375→            })
   376→   376→   376→
   377→   377→   377→            # Save search history
   378→   378→   378→            keyword_count = len([c for c in all_candidates if c.boss_id in seen_ids])
   379→   379→   379→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   380→   380→   380→                history = SearchHistory(
   381→   381→   381→                    criteria={
   382→   382→   382→                        'keywords': keyword,
   383→   383→   383→                        'location': location,
   384→   384→   384→                        'refresh_rounds': max_pages,
   385→   385→   385→                        'experience': experience,
   386→   386→   386→                        'education': education,
   387→   387→   387→                        'salary': salary,
   388→   388→   388→                    },
   389→   389→   389→                    results_count=keyword_count,
   390→   390→   390→                )
   391→   391→   391→                session.add(history)
   392→   392→   392→
   393→   393→   393→        except Exception as e:
   394→   394→   394→            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   395→   395→   395→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   396→   396→   396→            rate_limiter.report_error()
   397→   397→   397→
   398→   398→   398→    console.print(f"\n[green]Total unique candidates: {len(all_candidates)}[/green]")
   399→   399→   399→
   400→   400→   400→    # Save candidates to database
   401→   401→   401→    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   402→   402→   402→
   403→   403→   403→    # Display results summary
   404→   404→   404→    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   405→   405→   405→
   406→   406→   406→    return all_candidates
   407→   407→   407→
   408→   408→   408→
   409→   409→   409→async def _refresh_search_results(frame: Frame) -> None:
   410→   410→   410→    """Click "换一换" button in the search iframe to load new candidates.
   411→   411→   411→
   412→   412→   412→    Boss直聘 search does NOT use infinite scroll. Instead it shows ~30 cards
   413→   413→   413→    and provides a "换一换" button to refresh the list with new candidates.
   414→   414→   414→    """
   415→   415→   415→    try:
   416→   416→   416→        refresh_btn = await frame.query_selector('.change-btn')
   417→   417→   417→        if refresh_btn and await refresh_btn.is_visible():
   418→   418→   418→            await refresh_btn.click()
   419→   419→   419→            # Wait for new cards to load
   420→   420→   420→            await frame.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   421→   421→   421→            return
   422→   422→   422→    except Exception as e:
   423→   423→   423→        logger.warning(f"Could not click refresh button: {e}")
   424→   424→   424→
   425→   425→   425→    # Fallback: scroll the iframe body to trigger any lazy loading
   426→   426→   426→    await frame.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)")
   427→   427→   427→    await frame.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   428→   428→   428→
   429→   429→   429→
   430→   430→   430→async def _check_quota_exhausted(frame: Frame) -> bool:
   431→   431→   431→    """Check if Boss直聘 shows a quota exhaustion indicator."""
   432→   432→   432→    try:
   433→   433→   433→        result = await frame.evaluate("""
   434→   434→   434→            () => {
   435→   435→   435→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   436→   436→   436→                const quotaIndicators = [
   437→   437→   437→                    '今日沟通次数已用完',
   438→   438→   438→                    '沟通次数已达上限',
   439→   439→   439→                    '今日联系人数已满',
   440→   440→   440→                    '升级会员',
   441→   441→   441→                    '开通会员享更多沟通'
   442→   442→   442→                ];
   443→   443→   443→                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   444→   444→   444→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   445→   445→   445→                        return true;
   446→   446→   446→                    }
   447→   447→   447→                }
   448→   448→   448→                return false;
   449→   449→   449→            }
   450→   450→   450→        """)
   451→   451→   451→        return result
   452→   452→   452→    except Exception:
   453→   453→   453→        return False
   454→   454→   454→
   455→   455→   455→
   456→   456→   456→def _save_candidates_to_db(
   457→   457→   457→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   458→   458→   458→    keywords: List[str],
   459→   459→   459→    db_manager,
   460→   460→   460→) -> None:
   461→   461→   461→    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   462→   462→   462→    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   463→   463→   463→
   464→   464→   464→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   465→   465→   465→        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   466→   466→   466→        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   467→   467→   467→        existing_map = {}
   468→   468→   468→        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   469→   469→   469→            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   470→   470→   470→            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   471→   471→   471→                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   472→   472→   472→            ).all()
   473→   473→   473→            for row in rows:
   474→   474→   474→                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   475→   475→   475→
   476→   476→   476→        for c in candidates:
   477→   477→   477→            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   478→   478→   478→            if existing:
   479→   479→   479→                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   480→   480→   480→                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   481→   481→   481→                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   482→   482→   482→                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   483→   483→   483→                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   484→   484→   484→                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   485→   485→   485→                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   486→   486→   486→                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   487→   487→   487→                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   488→   488→   488→                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   489→   489→   489→            else:
   490→   490→   490→                new_candidate = Candidate(
   491→   491→   491→                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   492→   492→   492→                    name=c.name,
   493→   493→   493→                    title=c.title,
   494→   494→   494→                    company=c.company,
   495→   495→   495→                    location=c.location,
   496→   496→   496→                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   497→   497→   497→                    work_years=c.work_years,
   498→   498→   498→                    education_level=c.education_level,
   499→   499→   499→                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   500→   500→   500→                    source_search=source,
   501→   501→   501→                )
   502→   502→   502→                session.add(new_candidate)
   503→   503→   503→
   504→   504→   504→
   505→   505→   505→def _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   506→   506→   506→    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   507→   507→   507→    if not candidates:
