1→     1→     1→     1→"""Serial browser task queue with priority support.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→All browser operations go through this queue to ensure only one
     4→     4→     4→     4→browser action runs at a time (Chrome CDP is a serial resource).
     5→     5→     5→     5→Non-browser operations (DB queries, template listing) bypass the queue.
     6→     6→     6→     6→"""
     7→     7→     7→     7→
     8→     8→     8→     8→import asyncio
     9→     9→     9→     9→import uuid
    10→    10→    10→    10→from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
    11→    11→    11→    11→from enum import IntEnum
    12→    12→    12→    12→from typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, Optional
    13→    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→    14→from loguru import logger
    15→    15→    15→    15→
    16→    16→    16→    16→from src.utils.progress import set_progress_callback, reset_progress_callback
    17→    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→    18→
    19→    19→    19→    19→class TaskPriority(IntEnum):
    20→    20→    20→    20→    """Task priority levels. Lower value = higher priority."""
    21→    21→    21→    21→    HIGH = 1      # Status checks, auth
    22→    22→    22→    22→    NORMAL = 5    # Search, message
    23→    23→    23→    23→    LOW = 10      # Pipeline (long-running)
    24→    24→    24→    24→
    25→    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→    26→class TaskStatus:
    27→    27→    27→    27→    QUEUED = "queued"
    28→    28→    28→    28→    RUNNING = "running"
    29→    29→    29→    29→    COMPLETED = "completed"
    30→    30→    30→    30→    FAILED = "failed"
    31→    31→    31→    31→    CANCELLED = "cancelled"
    32→    32→    32→    32→
    33→    33→    33→    33→
    34→    34→    34→    34→class BrowserTask:
    35→    35→    35→    35→    """A task to be executed in the browser queue."""
    36→    36→    36→    36→
    37→    37→    37→    37→    def __init__(
    38→    38→    38→    38→        self,
    39→    39→    39→    39→        name: str,
    40→    40→    40→    40→        coroutine_factory: Callable[[], Awaitable[Any]],
    41→    41→    41→    41→        priority: TaskPriority = TaskPriority.NORMAL,
    42→    42→    42→    42→        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
    43→    43→    43→    43→    ):
    44→    44→    44→    44→        self.task_id = task_id or str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
    45→    45→    45→    45→        self.name = name
    46→    46→    46→    46→        self.coroutine_factory = coroutine_factory
    47→    47→    47→    47→        self.priority = priority
    48→    48→    48→    48→        self.status = TaskStatus.QUEUED
    49→    49→    49→    49→        self.result: Any = None
    50→    50→    50→    50→        self.error: Optional[str] = None
    51→    51→    51→    51→        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    52→    52→    52→    52→        self.started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    53→    53→    53→    53→        self.completed_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    54→    54→    54→    54→        self._done_event = asyncio.Event()
    55→    55→    55→    55→        self.cancel_event = asyncio.Event()
    56→    56→    56→    56→
    57→    57→    57→    57→    def __lt__(self, other: 'BrowserTask') -> bool:
    58→    58→    58→    58→        """Compare by (priority, creation time) for PriorityQueue."""
    59→    59→    59→    59→        if self.priority != other.priority:
    60→    60→    60→    60→            return self.priority < other.priority
    61→    61→    61→    61→        return self.created_at < other.created_at
    62→    62→    62→    62→
    63→    63→    63→    63→    async def wait(self, timeout: Optional[float] = None) -> None:
    64→    64→    64→    64→        """Wait for task completion."""
    65→    65→    65→    65→        if timeout:
    66→    66→    66→    66→            await asyncio.wait_for(self._done_event.wait(), timeout=timeout)
    67→    67→    67→    67→        else:
    68→    68→    68→    68→            await self._done_event.wait()
    69→    69→    69→    69→
    70→    70→    70→    70→    def mark_done(self) -> None:
    71→    71→    71→    71→        self._done_event.set()
    72→    72→    72→    72→
    73→    73→    73→    73→    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
    74→    74→    74→    74→        return {
    75→    75→    75→    75→            "task_id": self.task_id,
    76→    76→    76→    76→            "name": self.name,
    77→    77→    77→    77→            "status": self.status,
    78→    78→    78→    78→            "priority": self.priority.name,
    79→    79→    79→    79→            "created_at": self.created_at.isoformat(),
    80→    80→    80→    80→            "started_at": self.started_at.isoformat() if self.started_at else None,
    81→    81→    81→    81→            "completed_at": self.completed_at.isoformat() if self.completed_at else None,
    82→    82→    82→    82→            "error": self.error,
    83→    83→    83→    83→        }
    84→    84→    84→    84→
    85→    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→    86→class TaskQueue:
    87→    87→    87→    87→    """Async serial task queue for browser operations.
    88→    88→    88→    88→
    89→    89→    89→    89→    Uses asyncio.PriorityQueue so higher-priority tasks run first.
    90→    90→    90→    90→    A single background worker consumes tasks one at a time.
    91→    91→    91→    91→    Progress is injected via ContextVar and delivered through per-task
    92→    92→    92→    92→    asyncio.Queue for SSE streaming.
    93→    93→    93→    93→    """
    94→    94→    94→    94→
    95→    95→    95→    95→    def __init__(self):
    96→    96→    96→    96→        self._queue: asyncio.PriorityQueue[BrowserTask] = asyncio.PriorityQueue()
    97→    97→    97→    97→        self._worker_task: Optional[asyncio.Task] = None
    98→    98→    98→    98→        self._tasks: Dict[str, BrowserTask] = {}
    99→    99→    99→    99→        self._progress_queues: Dict[str, asyncio.Queue] = {}
   100→   100→   100→   100→        self._running: bool = False
   101→   101→   101→   101→        self._current_task: Optional[BrowserTask] = None
   102→   102→   102→   102→        self._completed_count: int = 0
   103→   103→   103→   103→
   104→   104→   104→   104→    async def start(self) -> None:
   105→   105→   105→   105→        """Start the background worker."""
   106→   106→   106→   106→        if self._running:
   107→   107→   107→   107→            return
   108→   108→   108→   108→        self._running = True
   109→   109→   109→   109→        self._worker_task = asyncio.create_task(self._worker())
   110→   110→   110→   110→        logger.info("Task queue worker started")
   111→   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→   112→    async def stop(self) -> None:
   113→   113→   113→   113→        """Stop the background worker."""
   114→   114→   114→   114→        self._running = False
   115→   115→   115→   115→        # Cancel running task
   116→   116→   116→   116→        if self._current_task and self._current_task.cancel_event:
   117→   117→   117→   117→            self._current_task.cancel_event.set()
   118→   118→   118→   118→        if self._worker_task:
   119→   119→   119→   119→            self._worker_task.cancel()
   120→   120→   120→   120→            try:
   121→   121→   121→   121→                await self._worker_task
   122→   122→   122→   122→            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   123→   123→   123→   123→                pass
   124→   124→   124→   124→            finally:
   125→   125→   125→   125→                self._worker_task = None
   126→   126→   126→   126→        logger.info("Task queue worker stopped")
   127→   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→   128→    async def submit(self, task: BrowserTask) -> BrowserTask:
   129→   129→   129→   129→        """Submit a task to the queue."""
   130→   130→   130→   130→        self._tasks[task.task_id] = task
   131→   131→   131→   131→        self._progress_queues[task.task_id] = asyncio.Queue()
   132→   132→   132→   132→        await self._queue.put(task)
   133→   133→   133→   133→        logger.info(f"Task queued: {task.task_id} ({task.name}) priority={task.priority.name}")
   134→   134→   134→   134→        return task
   135→   135→   135→   135→
   136→   136→   136→   136→    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[BrowserTask]:
   137→   137→   137→   137→        return self._tasks.get(task_id)
   138→   138→   138→   138→
   139→   139→   139→   139→    @property
   140→   140→   140→   140→    def is_busy(self) -> bool:
   141→   141→   141→   141→        return self._current_task is not None
   142→   142→   142→   142→
   143→   143→   143→   143→    @property
   144→   144→   144→   144→    def current_task(self) -> Optional[BrowserTask]:
   145→   145→   145→   145→        return self._current_task
   146→   146→   146→   146→
   147→   147→   147→   147→    @property
   148→   148→   148→   148→    def current_task_id(self) -> Optional[str]:
   149→   149→   149→   149→        return self._current_task.task_id if self._current_task else None
   150→   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→   151→    @property
   152→   152→   152→   152→    def queue_size(self) -> int:
   153→   153→   153→   153→        return self._queue.qsize()
   154→   154→   154→   154→
   155→   155→   155→   155→    def get_queue_status(self) -> dict:
   156→   156→   156→   156→        pending = [
   157→   157→   157→   157→            t.to_dict() for t in self._tasks.values()
   158→   158→   158→   158→            if t.status == TaskStatus.QUEUED
   159→   159→   159→   159→        ]
   160→   160→   160→   160→        return {
   161→   161→   161→   161→            "queue_size": self._queue.qsize(),
   162→   162→   162→   162→            "current_task": self._current_task.to_dict() if self._current_task else None,
   163→   163→   163→   163→            "pending_tasks": pending,
   164→   164→   164→   164→            "total_tracked": len(self._tasks),
   165→   165→   165→   165→        }
   166→   166→   166→   166→
   167→   167→   167→   167→    async def cancel_task(self, task_id: str) -> bool:
   168→   168→   168→   168→        """Cancel a specific task (running or queued)."""
   169→   169→   169→   169→        task = self._tasks.get(task_id)
   170→   170→   170→   170→        if not task:
   171→   171→   171→   171→            return False
   172→   172→   172→   172→        task.cancel_event.set()
   173→   173→   173→   173→        if task.status == TaskStatus.QUEUED:
   174→   174→   174→   174→            task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   175→   175→   175→   175→            task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   176→   176→   176→   176→            task.mark_done()
   177→   177→   177→   177→        logger.info(f"Cancel requested for task {task_id}")
   178→   178→   178→   178→        return True
   179→   179→   179→   179→
   180→   180→   180→   180→    async def cancel_current(self) -> bool:
   181→   181→   181→   181→        """Cancel the currently running task."""
   182→   182→   182→   182→        if not self._current_task:
   183→   183→   183→   183→            return False
   184→   184→   184→   184→        return await self.cancel_task(self._current_task.task_id)
   185→   185→   185→   185→
   186→   186→   186→   186→    # --- Progress / SSE ---
   187→   187→   187→   187→
   188→   188→   188→   188→    def _make_progress_callback(self, task_id: str):
   189→   189→   189→   189→        """Create a progress callback bound to a task's SSE queue."""
   190→   190→   190→   190→        async def callback(event: str, data: Dict[str, Any] = None):
   191→   191→   191→   191→            queue = self._progress_queues.get(task_id)
   192→   192→   192→   192→            if queue:
   193→   193→   193→   193→                await queue.put({"event": event, "data": data or {}})
   194→   194→   194→   194→        return callback
   195→   195→   195→   195→
   196→   196→   196→   196→    async def subscribe_progress(self, task_id: str):
   197→   197→   197→   197→        """Async generator yielding progress events for SSE."""
   198→   198→   198→   198→        queue = self._progress_queues.get(task_id)
   199→   199→   199→   199→        if not queue:
   200→   200→   200→   200→            yield {"event": "error", "data": {"message": "Task not found"}}
   201→   201→   201→   201→            return
   202→   202→   202→   202→
   203→   203→   203→   203→        while True:
   204→   204→   204→   204→            try:
   205→   205→   205→   205→                msg = await asyncio.wait_for(queue.get(), timeout=30)
   206→   206→   206→   206→                yield msg
   207→   207→   207→   207→                if msg["event"] == "done":
   208→   208→   208→   208→                    break
   209→   209→   209→   209→            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   210→   210→   210→   210→                yield {"event": "keepalive", "data": {}}
   211→   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→   212→    # --- Worker ---
   213→   213→   213→   213→
   214→   214→   214→   214→    async def _worker(self) -> None:
   215→   215→   215→   215→        """Background worker: dequeue and execute tasks serially."""
   216→   216→   216→   216→        while self._running:
   217→   217→   217→   217→            try:
   218→   218→   218→   218→                task = await asyncio.wait_for(self._queue.get(), timeout=1.0)
   219→   219→   219→   219→            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   220→   220→   220→   220→                continue
   221→   221→   221→   221→            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   222→   222→   222→   222→                break
   223→   223→   223→   223→
   224→   224→   224→   224→            # Skip cancelled tasks that were cancelled while queued
   225→   225→   225→   225→            if task.cancel_event.is_set():
   226→   226→   226→   226→                if task.status != TaskStatus.CANCELLED:
   227→   227→   227→   227→                    task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   228→   228→   228→   228→                    task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   229→   229→   229→   229→                    task.mark_done()
   230→   230→   230→   230→                self._queue.task_done()
   231→   231→   231→   231→                continue
   232→   232→   232→   232→
   233→   233→   233→   233→            self._current_task = task
   234→   234→   234→   234→            task.status = TaskStatus.RUNNING
   235→   235→   235→   235→            task.started_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   236→   236→   236→   236→            logger.info(f"Task running: {task.task_id} ({task.name})")
   237→   237→   237→   237→
   238→   238→   238→   238→            token = set_progress_callback(self._make_progress_callback(task.task_id))
   239→   239→   239→   239→            try:
   240→   240→   240→   240→                task.result = await task.coroutine_factory()
   241→   241→   241→   241→                task.status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
   242→   242→   242→   242→                logger.info(f"Task completed: {task.task_id}")
   243→   243→   243→   243→            except asyncio.CancelledError:
   244→   244→   244→   244→                task.status = TaskStatus.CANCELLED
   245→   245→   245→   245→                task.error = "cancelled"
   246→   246→   246→   246→                logger.warning(f"Task cancelled: {task.task_id}")
   247→   247→   247→   247→            except Exception as e:
   248→   248→   248→   248→                task.status = TaskStatus.FAILED
   249→   249→   249→   249→                task.error = str(e)
   250→   250→   250→   250→                logger.error(f"Task failed: {task.task_id} — {e}")
   251→   251→   251→   251→            finally:
   252→   252→   252→   252→                reset_progress_callback(token)
   253→   253→   253→   253→                task.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   254→   254→   254→   254→                task.mark_done()
   255→   255→   255→   255→                # Send single done event with final status for SSE
   256→   256→   256→   256→                queue = self._progress_queues.get(task.task_id)
   257→   257→   257→   257→                if queue:
   258→   258→   258→   258→                    done_data = {"status": task.status}
   259→   259→   259→   259→                    if task.error:
   260→   260→   260→   260→                        done_data["message"] = task.error
   261→   261→   261→   261→                    await queue.put({"event": "done", "data": done_data})
   262→   262→   262→   262→                self._current_task = None
   263→   263→   263→   263→                self._queue.task_done()
   264→   264→   264→   264→
   265→   265→   265→   265→                self._completed_count += 1
   266→   266→   266→   266→                if self._completed_count % 10 == 0:
   267→   267→   267→   267→                    self._cleanup_old_tasks()
   268→   268→   268→   268→
   269→   269→   269→   269→    def _cleanup_old_tasks(self, max_age_hours: int = 24) -> int:
   270→   270→   270→   270→        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=max_age_hours)
   271→   271→   271→   271→        to_remove = [
   272→   272→   272→   272→            tid for tid, t in self._tasks.items()
   273→   273→   273→   273→            if t.status in (TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED)
   274→   274→   274→   274→            and t.completed_at and t.completed_at < cutoff
   275→   275→   275→   275→        ]
   276→   276→   276→   276→        for tid in to_remove:
   277→   277→   277→   277→            del self._tasks[tid]
   278→   278→   278→   278→            self._progress_queues.pop(tid, None)
   279→   279→   279→   279→        if to_remove:
   280→   280→   280→   280→            logger.debug(f"Cleaned up {len(to_remove)} old tasks")
   281→   281→   281→   281→        return len(to_remove)
   282→   282→   282→   282→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Session management for persistent browser sessions.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Handles saving and loading browser sessions (cookies, localStorage)
     4→     4→     4→     4→to enable resuming without re-login.
     5→     5→     5→     5→"""
     6→     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→     7→import json
     8→     8→     8→     8→import os
     9→     9→     9→     9→import stat
    10→    10→    10→    10→import tempfile
    11→    11→    11→    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→    12→    12→    12→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    13→    13→    13→    13→from typing import Optional
    14→    14→    14→    14→
    15→    15→    15→    15→from cryptography.fernet import Fernet
    16→    16→    16→    16→from patchright.async_api import BrowserContext
    17→    17→    17→    17→from loguru import logger
    18→    18→    18→    18→
    19→    19→    19→    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→    20→    20→    20→
    21→    21→    21→    21→
    22→    22→    22→    22→class SessionManager:
    23→    23→    23→    23→    """Manages browser session persistence."""
    24→    24→    24→    24→
    25→    25→    25→    25→    def __init__(self, session_path: Optional[str] = None):
    26→    26→    26→    26→        if session_path is None:
    27→    27→    27→    27→            config = get_config()
    28→    28→    28→    28→            session_path = config.get('data.session_path', 'data/.session/boss_session.json')
    29→    29→    29→    29→
    30→    30→    30→    30→        self.session_path = Path(session_path)
    31→    31→    31→    31→        self._key_path = self.session_path.parent / '.session_key'
    32→    32→    32→    32→        self._fernet: Optional[Fernet] = None
    33→    33→    33→    33→        self._ensure_session_dir()
    34→    34→    34→    34→
    35→    35→    35→    35→    def _ensure_session_dir(self) -> None:
    36→    36→    36→    36→        """Ensure session directory exists with restrictive permissions."""
    37→    37→    37→    37→        session_dir = self.session_path.parent
    38→    38→    38→    38→        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    39→    39→    39→    39→        try:
    40→    40→    40→    40→            os.chmod(session_dir, stat.S_IRWXU)
    41→    41→    41→    41→        except OSError:
    42→    42→    42→    42→            logger.warning("Could not set restrictive permissions on session directory")
    43→    43→    43→    43→
    44→    44→    44→    44→    def _get_fernet(self) -> Fernet:
    45→    45→    45→    45→        """Get or create Fernet encryption instance."""
    46→    46→    46→    46→        if self._fernet is not None:
    47→    47→    47→    47→            return self._fernet
    48→    48→    48→    48→
    49→    49→    49→    49→        if self._key_path.exists():
    50→    50→    50→    50→            key = self._key_path.read_bytes().strip()
    51→    51→    51→    51→        else:
    52→    52→    52→    52→            key = Fernet.generate_key()
    53→    53→    53→    53→            fd = os.open(str(self._key_path), os.O_WRONLY | os.O_CREAT | os.O_TRUNC, 0o600)
    54→    54→    54→    54→            try:
    55→    55→    55→    55→                os.write(fd, key)
    56→    56→    56→    56→            finally:
    57→    57→    57→    57→                os.close(fd)
    58→    58→    58→    58→
    59→    59→    59→    59→        self._fernet = Fernet(key)
    60→    60→    60→    60→        return self._fernet
    61→    61→    61→    61→
    62→    62→    62→    62→    def _decrypt_session_data(self) -> dict:
    63→    63→    63→    63→        """Decrypt and parse the stored session file."""
    64→    64→    64→    64→        encrypted = self.session_path.read_bytes()
    65→    65→    65→    65→        plaintext = self._get_fernet().decrypt(encrypted)
    66→    66→    66→    66→        return json.loads(plaintext.decode('utf-8'))
    67→    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→    68→    def _write_secure(self, path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    69→    69→    69→    69→        """Atomically write data to file with owner-only permissions (0600)."""
    70→    70→    70→    70→        tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=str(path.parent), suffix=".tmp")
    71→    71→    71→    71→        try:
    72→    72→    72→    72→            os.write(tmp_fd, data)
    73→    73→    73→    73→            os.close(tmp_fd)
    74→    74→    74→    74→            tmp_fd = -1
    75→    75→    75→    75→            os.chmod(tmp_path, 0o600)
    76→    76→    76→    76→            os.replace(tmp_path, str(path))
    77→    77→    77→    77→        except BaseException:
    78→    78→    78→    78→            if tmp_fd >= 0:
    79→    79→    79→    79→                os.close(tmp_fd)
    80→    80→    80→    80→            try:
    81→    81→    81→    81→                os.unlink(tmp_path)
    82→    82→    82→    82→            except OSError:
    83→    83→    83→    83→                pass
    84→    84→    84→    84→            raise
    85→    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→    86→    def has_saved_session(self) -> bool:
    87→    87→    87→    87→        return self.session_path.exists()
    88→    88→    88→    88→
    89→    89→    89→    89→    async def save(self, context: BrowserContext) -> None:
    90→    90→    90→    90→        try:
    91→    91→    91→    91→            storage_state = await context.storage_state()
    92→    92→    92→    92→            session_data = {
    93→    93→    93→    93→                'saved_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    94→    94→    94→    94→                'storage_state': storage_state
    95→    95→    95→    95→            }
    96→    96→    96→    96→            plaintext = json.dumps(session_data, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
    97→    97→    97→    97→            encrypted = self._get_fernet().encrypt(plaintext)
    98→    98→    98→    98→            self._write_secure(self.session_path, encrypted)
    99→    99→    99→    99→            logger.info(f"Session saved (encrypted) to {self.session_path}")
   100→   100→   100→   100→        except Exception as e:
   101→   101→   101→   101→            logger.error(f"Failed to save session: {e}")
   102→   102→   102→   102→            raise
   103→   103→   103→   103→
   104→   104→   104→   104→    async def clear(self) -> None:
   105→   105→   105→   105→        """Clear saved session and encryption key."""
   106→   106→   106→   106→        if self.session_path.exists():
   107→   107→   107→   107→            self.session_path.unlink()
   108→   108→   108→   108→            logger.info("Session cleared")
   109→   109→   109→   109→
   110→   110→   110→   110→        state_path = self.session_path.parent / 'storage_state.json'
   111→   111→   111→   111→        if state_path.exists():
   112→   112→   112→   112→            state_path.unlink()
   113→   113→   113→   113→
   114→   114→   114→   114→        if self._key_path.exists():
   115→   115→   115→   115→            self._key_path.unlink()
   116→   116→   116→   116→        self._fernet = None
   117→   117→   117→   117→
   118→   118→   118→   118→    def get_session_info(self) -> Optional[dict]:
   119→   119→   119→   119→        if not self.has_saved_session():
   120→   120→   120→   120→            return None
   121→   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→   122→        try:
   123→   123→   123→   123→            session_data = self._decrypt_session_data()
   124→   124→   124→   124→            saved_at = session_data.get('saved_at')
   125→   125→   125→   125→            storage_state = session_data.get('storage_state', {})
   126→   126→   126→   126→            cookies = storage_state.get('cookies', [])
   127→   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→   128→            if saved_at:
   129→   129→   129→   129→                saved_datetime = datetime.fromisoformat(saved_at)
   130→   130→   130→   130→                if saved_datetime.tzinfo is None:
   131→   131→   131→   131→                    saved_datetime = saved_datetime.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   132→   132→   132→   132→                age = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - saved_datetime
   133→   133→   133→   133→                age_str = f"{age.days}d {age.seconds // 3600}h"
   134→   134→   134→   134→            else:
   135→   135→   135→   135→                age_str = "unknown"
   136→   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→   137→            return {
   138→   138→   138→   138→                'saved_at': saved_at,
   139→   139→   139→   139→                'age': age_str,
   140→   140→   140→   140→                'cookie_count': len(cookies),
   141→   141→   141→   141→            }
   142→   142→   142→   142→        except Exception as e:
   143→   143→   143→   143→            logger.error(f"Failed to get session info: {e}")
   144→   144→   144→   144→            return None
   145→   145→   145→   145→
   146→   146→   146→   146→
   147→   147→   147→   147→# Global session manager instance
   148→   148→   148→   148→_session_manager = None
   149→   149→   149→   149→
   150→   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→   151→def get_session_manager() -> SessionManager:
   152→   152→   152→   152→    """Get global session manager instance."""
   153→   153→   153→   153→    global _session_manager
   154→   154→   154→   154→    if _session_manager is None:
   155→   155→   155→   155→        _session_manager = SessionManager()
   156→   156→   156→   156→    return _session_manager
   157→   157→   157→   157→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Authentication module for Boss直聘 login.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→In CDP mode, the user logs in manually in their own Chrome before running
     4→     4→     4→     4→CLI commands. This module verifies login status and provides guidance
     5→     5→     5→     5→if the user is not logged in.
     6→     6→     6→     6→"""
     7→     7→     7→     7→
     8→     8→     8→     8→import asyncio
     9→     9→     9→     9→from typing import Optional
    10→    10→    10→    10→
    11→    11→    11→    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→    12→    12→    12→from loguru import logger
    13→    13→    13→    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→    14→    14→    14→from rich.panel import Panel
    15→    15→    15→    15→
    16→    16→    16→    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→    17→    17→    17→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    18→    18→    18→    18→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    19→    19→    19→    19→from src.exceptions.errors import SessionExpiredError
    20→    20→    20→    20→
    21→    21→    21→    21→console = Console()
    22→    22→    22→    22→
    23→    23→    23→    23→
    24→    24→    24→    24→async def login(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
    25→    25→    25→    25→    """
    26→    26→    26→    26→    Verify login status in CDP-connected Chrome.
    27→    27→    27→    27→
    28→    28→    28→    28→    In CDP mode, the user is expected to already be logged in to Boss直聘.
    29→    29→    29→    29→    If not, instructions are printed for manual login in the browser.
    30→    30→    30→    30→
    31→    31→    31→    31→    Args:
    32→    32→    32→    32→        browser: Browser manager instance (uses global if None)
    33→    33→    33→    33→
    34→    34→    34→    34→    Returns:
    35→    35→    35→    35→        True if logged in
    36→    36→    36→    36→    """
    37→    37→    37→    37→    if browser is None:
    38→    38→    38→    38→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    39→    39→    39→    39→
    40→    40→    40→    40→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP
    41→    41→    41→    41→    page = await browser.start()
    42→    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    43→    # Check if already logged in
    44→    44→    44→    44→    if await check_login_status(page):
    45→    45→    45→    45→        console.print("[green]Already logged in to Boss直聘![/green]")
    46→    46→    46→    46→        # Save session as backup
    47→    47→    47→    47→        await browser.save_session()
    48→    48→    48→    48→        return True
    49→    49→    49→    49→
    50→    50→    50→    50→    # Not logged in — guide the user
    51→    51→    51→    51→    console.print(Panel(
    52→    52→    52→    52→        "[bold]Not Logged In[/bold]\n\n"
    53→    53→    53→    53→        "Please log in to Boss直聘 in your Chrome browser:\n"
    54→    54→    54→    54→        "1. Go to https://www.zhipin.com/web/user/?ka=header-login in Chrome\n"
    55→    55→    55→    55→        "2. Scan QR code with Boss直聘 app, OR\n"
    56→    56→    56→    56→        "3. Enter phone number and verification code\n\n"
    57→    57→    57→    57→        "[dim]Then wait here, login will be detected automatically.[/dim]",
    58→    58→    58→    58→        title="Boss直聘 Login",
    59→    59→    59→    59→        border_style="cyan"
    60→    60→    60→    60→    ))
    61→    61→    61→    61→
    62→    62→    62→    62→    # Poll for login (user may log in while we wait)
    63→    63→    63→    63→    max_wait_seconds = 300  # 5 minutes timeout
    64→    64→    64→    64→    poll_interval = 3
    65→    65→    65→    65→    elapsed = 0
    66→    66→    66→    66→
    67→    67→    67→    67→    console.print("[dim]Waiting for login... (timeout: 5 minutes)[/dim]")
    68→    68→    68→    68→
    69→    69→    69→    69→    while elapsed < max_wait_seconds:
    70→    70→    70→    70→        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
    71→    71→    71→    71→        elapsed += poll_interval
    72→    72→    72→    72→
    73→    73→    73→    73→        # Check for captcha
    74→    74→    74→    74→        await check_captcha(page)
    75→    75→    75→    75→
    76→    76→    76→    76→        if await check_login_status(page):
    77→    77→    77→    77→            console.print("[green]Login successful![/green]")
    78→    78→    78→    78→            await browser.save_session()
    79→    79→    79→    79→            console.print("[green]Session saved as backup[/green]")
    80→    80→    80→    80→            return True
    81→    81→    81→    81→
    82→    82→    82→    82→    console.print("[red]Login timeout. Please log in manually and try again.[/red]")
    83→    83→    83→    83→    return False
    84→    84→    84→    84→
    85→    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→    86→async def check_login_status(page: Page) -> bool:
    87→    87→    87→    87→    """
    88→    88→    88→    88→    Check if user is currently logged in to Boss直聘 by navigating to a
    89→    89→    89→    89→    protected page and observing whether Boss直聘 redirects to the login page.
    90→    90→    90→    90→
    91→    91→    91→    91→    Args:
    92→    92→    92→    92→        page: Playwright page instance
    93→    93→    93→    93→
    94→    94→    94→    94→    Returns:
    95→    95→    95→    95→        True if logged in (no redirect to login page)
    96→    96→    96→    96→    """
    97→    97→    97→    97→    try:
    98→    98→    98→    98→        # Navigate to a protected page that requires authentication.
    99→    99→    99→    99→        # The Boss search page reliably triggers server-side auth checks.
   100→   100→   100→   100→        protected_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   101→   101→   101→   101→        await retry_navigation(page, protected_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   102→   102→   102→   102→
   103→   103→   103→   103→        # Wait for any redirects to settle
   104→   104→   104→   104→        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   105→   105→   105→   105→
   106→   106→   106→   106→        # Check 1: URL-based detection - did we get redirected to login?
   107→   107→   107→   107→        final_url = page.url
   108→   108→   108→   108→        if 'login' in final_url.lower() or 'signin' in final_url.lower():
   109→   109→   109→   109→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=redirected_to_login (url={final_url})")
   110→   110→   110→   110→            return False
   111→   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→   112→        # Check 2: Page content detection - look for login form elements
   113→   113→   113→   113→        is_login_page = await page.evaluate("""
   114→   114→   114→   114→            () => {
   115→   115→   115→   115→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   116→   116→   116→   116→                const loginIndicators = [
   117→   117→   117→   117→                    '欢迎登录',
   118→   118→   118→   118→                    '扫码登录',
   119→   119→   119→   119→                    '密码登录',
   120→   120→   120→   120→                    '短信登录',
   121→   121→   121→   121→                    '请输入手机号',
   122→   122→   122→   122→                    '获取验证码',
   123→   123→   123→   123→                    '微信登录',
   124→   124→   124→   124→                    '登录/注册'
   125→   125→   125→   125→                ];
   126→   126→   126→   126→                for (const indicator of loginIndicators) {
   127→   127→   127→   127→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   128→   128→   128→   128→                        return { is_login: true, matched: indicator };
   129→   129→   129→   129→                    }
   130→   130→   130→   130→                }
   131→   131→   131→   131→
   132→   132→   132→   132→                // Also check for login form elements in DOM
   133→   133→   133→   133→                const loginForm = document.querySelector(
   134→   134→   134→   134→                    'input[type="tel"], input[placeholder*="手机"], ' +
   135→   135→   135→   135→                    '[class*="qrcode"], [class*="scan-login"], ' +
   136→   136→   136→   136→                    '[class*="login-form"], [class*="sign-form"]'
   137→   137→   137→   137→                );
   138→   138→   138→   138→                if (loginForm) {
   139→   139→   139→   139→                    return { is_login: true, matched: 'login_form_element' };
   140→   140→   140→   140→                }
   141→   141→   141→   141→
   142→   142→   142→   142→                return { is_login: false, matched: null };
   143→   143→   143→   143→            }
   144→   144→   144→   144→        """)
   145→   145→   145→   145→
   146→   146→   146→   146→        if is_login_page.get('is_login', False):
   147→   147→   147→   147→            detail = is_login_page.get('matched', 'unknown')
   148→   148→   148→   148→            logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=False, detail=login_page_detected ({detail})")
   149→   149→   149→   149→            return False
   150→   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→   151→        logger.info(f"Login status check: logged_in=True, detail=protected_page_accessible (url={final_url})")
   152→   152→   152→   152→        return True
   153→   153→   153→   153→
   154→   154→   154→   154→    except Exception as e:
   155→   155→   155→   155→        logger.error(f"Error checking login status: {e}")
   156→   156→   156→   156→        return False
   157→   157→   157→   157→
   158→   158→   158→   158→
   159→   159→   159→   159→async def ensure_logged_in(browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None) -> bool:
   160→   160→   160→   160→    """
   161→   161→   161→   161→    Ensure user is logged in, prompting for login if needed.
   162→   162→   162→   162→
   163→   163→   163→   163→    Args:
   164→   164→   164→   164→        browser: Browser manager instance
   165→   165→   165→   165→
   166→   166→   166→   166→    Returns:
   167→   167→   167→   167→        True if logged in (existing or new login)
   168→   168→   168→   168→
   169→   169→   169→   169→    Raises:
   170→   170→   170→   170→        SessionExpiredError: If login fails
   171→   171→   171→   171→    """
   172→   172→   172→   172→    if browser is None:
   173→   173→   173→   173→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   174→   174→   174→   174→
   175→   175→   175→   175→    # Connect to Chrome via CDP if not already connected
   176→   176→   176→   176→    if not browser.is_running:
   177→   177→   177→   177→        await browser.start()
   178→   178→   178→   178→
   179→   179→   179→   179→    # Check login status
   180→   180→   180→   180→    if browser.page:
   181→   181→   181→   181→        if await check_login_status(browser.page):
   182→   182→   182→   182→            return True
   183→   183→   183→   183→
   184→   184→   184→   184→    # Not logged in — guide user
   185→   185→   185→   185→    console.print("[yellow]Not logged in. Please log in to Boss直聘 in your Chrome browser.[/yellow]")
   186→   186→   186→   186→
   187→   187→   187→   187→    if await login(browser):
   188→   188→   188→   188→        return True
   189→   189→   189→   189→
   190→   190→   190→   190→    raise SessionExpiredError("Not logged in to Boss直聘. Please log in manually in Chrome and try again.")
   191→   191→   191→   191→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Browser manager for Playwright automation.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Provides a singleton browser manager that connects to an existing Chrome
     4→     4→     4→     4→instance via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol). Supports multi-tab management
     5→     5→     5→     5→for workflows that open new tabs.
     6→     6→     6→     6→"""
     7→     7→     7→     7→
     8→     8→     8→     8→import asyncio
     9→     9→     9→     9→import threading
    10→    10→    10→    10→from pathlib import Path
    11→    11→    11→    11→from typing import List, Optional
    12→    12→    12→    12→from datetime import datetime
    13→    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→    14→from patchright.async_api import async_playwright, Browser, BrowserContext, Page, Playwright
    15→    15→    15→    15→from loguru import logger
    16→    16→    16→    16→
    17→    17→    17→    17→from src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    18→    18→    18→    18→from src.core.session import SessionManager, get_session_manager
    19→    19→    19→    19→from src.exceptions.errors import BrowserError
    20→    20→    20→    20→
    21→    21→    21→    21→
    22→    22→    22→    22→class BrowserManager:
    23→    23→    23→    23→    """
    24→    24→    24→    24→    Singleton browser manager for Boss直聘 automation.
    25→    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→    26→    Connects to a user-managed Chrome instance via CDP endpoint.
    27→    27→    27→    27→    The user starts Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and logs in
    28→    28→    28→    28→    manually. This manager connects/disconnects without closing Chrome.
    29→    29→    29→    29→    """
    30→    30→    30→    30→
    31→    31→    31→    31→    _instance: Optional['BrowserManager'] = None
    32→    32→    32→    32→    _lock: Optional[asyncio.Lock] = None
    33→    33→    33→    33→    _lock_loop = None
    34→    34→    34→    34→    _init_lock: threading.Lock = threading.Lock()
    35→    35→    35→    35→
    36→    36→    36→    36→    def __new__(cls, **kwargs):
    37→    37→    37→    37→        with cls._init_lock:
    38→    38→    38→    38→            if cls._instance is None:
    39→    39→    39→    39→                cls._instance = super().__new__(cls)
    40→    40→    40→    40→                cls._instance._initialized = False
    41→    41→    41→    41→            return cls._instance
    42→    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    43→    def __init__(
    44→    44→    44→    44→        self,
    45→    45→    45→    45→        config: Optional[Config] = None,
    46→    46→    46→    46→        session_manager: Optional[SessionManager] = None,
    47→    47→    47→    47→    ):
    48→    48→    48→    48→        if self._initialized:
    49→    49→    49→    49→            return
    50→    50→    50→    50→
    51→    51→    51→    51→        self._playwright: Optional[Playwright] = None
    52→    52→    52→    52→        self._browser: Optional[Browser] = None
    53→    53→    53→    53→        self._context: Optional[BrowserContext] = None
    54→    54→    54→    54→        self._page: Optional[Page] = None
    55→    55→    55→    55→        self._primary_page: Optional[Page] = None
    56→    56→    56→    56→        self._opened_tabs: List[Page] = []
    57→    57→    57→    57→        self._session_manager: SessionManager = session_manager or get_session_manager()
    58→    58→    58→    58→        self._config: Config = config or get_config()
    59→    59→    59→    59→        self._cdp_endpoint: Optional[str] = None
    60→    60→    60→    60→        self._owned_page: bool = False
    61→    61→    61→    61→        self._initialized = True
    62→    62→    62→    62→
    63→    63→    63→    63→    @property
    64→    64→    64→    64→    def is_running(self) -> bool:
    65→    65→    65→    65→        """Check if browser is currently connected."""
    66→    66→    66→    66→        return self._browser is not None and self._browser.is_connected()
    67→    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→    68→    @property
    69→    69→    69→    69→    def page(self) -> Optional[Page]:
    70→    70→    70→    70→        """Get current page instance."""
    71→    71→    71→    71→        return self._page
    72→    72→    72→    72→
    73→    73→    73→    73→    @property
    74→    74→    74→    74→    def context(self) -> Optional[BrowserContext]:
    75→    75→    75→    75→        """Get current browser context."""
    76→    76→    76→    76→        return self._context
    77→    77→    77→    77→
    78→    78→    78→    78→    @classmethod
    79→    79→    79→    79→    def _ensure_lock(cls):
    80→    80→    80→    80→        """Lazily create the asyncio.Lock inside a running event loop.
    81→    81→    81→    81→
    82→    82→    82→    82→        Always recreates the lock when called from a different event loop
    83→    83→    83→    83→        than the one that created it. Python 3.10+ removed the _loop
    84→    84→    84→    84→        attribute from asyncio primitives, so we track the loop ourselves.
    85→    85→    85→    85→        """
    86→    86→    86→    86→        try:
    87→    87→    87→    87→            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    88→    88→    88→    88→        except RuntimeError:
    89→    89→    89→    89→            loop = None
    90→    90→    90→    90→        if cls._lock is None or (loop and getattr(cls, '_lock_loop', None) is not loop):
    91→    91→    91→    91→            cls._lock = asyncio.Lock()
    92→    92→    92→    92→            cls._lock_loop = loop
    93→    93→    93→    93→
    94→    94→    94→    94→    @classmethod
    95→    95→    95→    95→    async def reset_instance(cls) -> None:
    96→    96→    96→    96→        """Reset the singleton instance, closing any existing connection.
    97→    97→    97→    97→
    98→    98→    98→    98→        Used by Web service when Chrome process is restarted and a fresh
    99→    99→    99→    99→        connection is needed.
   100→   100→   100→   100→        """
   101→   101→   101→   101→        with cls._init_lock:
   102→   102→   102→   102→            if cls._instance is not None:
   103→   103→   103→   103→                try:
   104→   104→   104→   104→                    await cls._instance._close_internal()
   105→   105→   105→   105→                except Exception:
   106→   106→   106→   106→                    pass
   107→   107→   107→   107→                cls._instance = None
   108→   108→   108→   108→                cls._lock = None
   109→   109→   109→   109→                cls._lock_loop = None
   110→   110→   110→   110→
   111→   111→   111→   111→        global _browser_manager
   112→   112→   112→   112→        _browser_manager = None
   113→   113→   113→   113→
   114→   114→   114→   114→    def set_cdp_endpoint(self, endpoint: str) -> None:
   115→   115→   115→   115→        """Override CDP endpoint (e.g. from CLI --cdp flag)."""
   116→   116→   116→   116→        self._cdp_endpoint = endpoint
   117→   117→   117→   117→
   118→   118→   118→   118→    async def start(self) -> Page:
   119→   119→   119→   119→        """
   120→   120→   120→   120→        Connect to Chrome via CDP and return a page.
   121→   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→   122→        Returns:
   123→   123→   123→   123→            Configured Playwright page instance
   124→   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→   125→        Raises:
   126→   126→   126→   126→            BrowserError: If connection fails
   127→   127→   127→   127→        """
   128→   128→   128→   128→        self._ensure_lock()
   129→   129→   129→   129→        async with self._lock:
   130→   130→   130→   130→            if self.is_running:
   131→   131→   131→   131→                logger.debug("Browser already connected, returning existing page")
   132→   132→   132→   132→                return self._page
   133→   133→   133→   133→
   134→   134→   134→   134→            try:
   135→   135→   135→   135→                endpoint = self._cdp_endpoint or self._config.get(
   136→   136→   136→   136→                    'browser.cdp_endpoint', 'http://localhost:9222'
   137→   137→   137→   137→                )
   138→   138→   138→   138→                timeout = self._config.get('browser.timeout', 30000)
   139→   139→   139→   139→
   140→   140→   140→   140→                logger.info(f"Connecting to Chrome via CDP: {endpoint}")
   141→   141→   141→   141→
   142→   142→   142→   142→                self._playwright = await async_playwright().start()
   143→   143→   143→   143→                self._browser = await self._playwright.chromium.connect_over_cdp(endpoint)
   144→   144→   144→   144→
   145→   145→   145→   145→                contexts = self._browser.contexts
   146→   146→   146→   146→                if contexts:
   147→   147→   147→   147→                    self._context = contexts[0]
   148→   148→   148→   148→                else:
   149→   149→   149→   149→                    logger.warning("No existing context found, creating new one")
   150→   150→   150→   150→                    self._context = await self._browser.new_context()
   151→   151→   151→   151→
   152→   152→   152→   152→                self._context.set_default_timeout(timeout)
   153→   153→   153→   153→
   154→   154→   154→   154→                pages = self._context.pages
   155→   155→   155→   155→                if pages:
   156→   156→   156→   156→                    self._page = pages[0]
   157→   157→   157→   157→                    self._owned_page = False
   158→   158→   158→   158→                    logger.info(f"Reusing existing tab: {self._page.url}")
   159→   159→   159→   159→                else:
   160→   160→   160→   160→                    self._page = await self._context.new_page()
   161→   161→   161→   161→                    self._owned_page = True
   162→   162→   162→   162→                    logger.info("Created new tab")
   163→   163→   163→   163→
   164→   164→   164→   164→                self._primary_page = self._page
   165→   165→   165→   165→                self._opened_tabs = []
   166→   166→   166→   166→
   167→   167→   167→   167→                logger.info("Connected to Chrome via CDP successfully")
   168→   168→   168→   168→                return self._page
   169→   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→   170→            except Exception as e:
   171→   171→   171→   171→                logger.error(f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP: {e}")
   172→   172→   172→   172→                await self._close_internal()
   173→   173→   173→   173→                raise BrowserError(
   174→   174→   174→   174→                    f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP at {endpoint}. "
   175→   175→   175→   175→                    f"Make sure Chrome is running with --remote-debugging-port=9222. "
   176→   176→   176→   176→                    f"Error: {e}"
   177→   177→   177→   177→                )
   178→   178→   178→   178→
   179→   179→   179→   179→    async def close(self) -> None:
   180→   180→   180→   180→        """Disconnect from Chrome via CDP. Does NOT close the user's Chrome."""
   181→   181→   181→   181→        self._ensure_lock()
   182→   182→   182→   182→        async with self._lock:
   183→   183→   183→   183→            await self._close_internal()
   184→   184→   184→   184→
   185→   185→   185→   185→    async def _close_internal(self) -> None:
   186→   186→   186→   186→        """Actual cleanup logic."""
   187→   187→   187→   187→        try:
   188→   188→   188→   188→            for tab in self._opened_tabs:
   189→   189→   189→   189→                try:
   190→   190→   190→   190→                    if not tab.is_closed():
   191→   191→   191→   191→                        await tab.close()
   192→   192→   192→   192→                except Exception as e:
   193→   193→   193→   193→                    logger.debug(f"Error closing tab during cleanup: {e}")
   194→   194→   194→   194→            self._opened_tabs = []
   195→   195→   195→   195→
   196→   196→   196→   196→            if self._page and self._owned_page:
   197→   197→   197→   197→                try:
   198→   198→   198→   198→                    await self._page.close()
   199→   199→   199→   199→                except Exception as e:
   200→   200→   200→   200→                    logger.debug(f"Error closing page during cleanup: {e}")
   201→   201→   201→   201→            self._page = None
   202→   202→   202→   202→            self._primary_page = None
   203→   203→   203→   203→            self._owned_page = False
   204→   204→   204→   204→
   205→   205→   205→   205→            self._context = None
   206→   206→   206→   206→
   207→   207→   207→   207→            if self._browser:
   208→   208→   208→   208→                try:
   209→   209→   209→   209→                    await self._browser.close()
   210→   210→   210→   210→                except Exception as e:
   211→   211→   211→   211→                    logger.error(f"Error closing browser connection: {e}")
   212→   212→   212→   212→                finally:
   213→   213→   213→   213→                    self._browser = None
   214→   214→   214→   214→
   215→   215→   215→   215→            if self._playwright:
   216→   216→   216→   216→                try:
   217→   217→   217→   217→                    await self._playwright.stop()
   218→   218→   218→   218→                except Exception as e:
   219→   219→   219→   219→                    logger.error(f"Error stopping Playwright: {e}")
   220→   220→   220→   220→                finally:
   221→   221→   221→   221→                    self._playwright = None
   222→   222→   222→   222→
   223→   223→   223→   223→            logger.info("Disconnected from Chrome (browser stays open)")
   224→   224→   224→   224→
   225→   225→   225→   225→        except Exception as e:
   226→   226→   226→   226→            logger.error(f"Error disconnecting from Chrome: {e}")
   227→   227→   227→   227→
   228→   228→   228→   228→    async def wait_for_new_tab(self, timeout: int = 10000) -> Page:
   229→   229→   229→   229→        """Wait for a click-triggered new tab, apply stealth, and switch to it."""
   230→   230→   230→   230→        if not self._context:
   231→   231→   231→   231→            raise BrowserError("No active context for wait_for_new_tab")
   232→   232→   232→   232→
   233→   233→   233→   233→        try:
   234→   234→   234→   234→            new_page = await self._context.wait_for_event(
   235→   235→   235→   235→                "page", timeout=timeout
   236→   236→   236→   236→            )
   237→   237→   237→   237→            await new_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
   238→   238→   238→   238→            self._opened_tabs.append(new_page)
   239→   239→   239→   239→            self._page = new_page
   240→   240→   240→   240→            logger.info(f"New tab captured: {new_page.url}")
   241→   241→   241→   241→            return new_page
   242→   242→   242→   242→        except Exception as e:
   243→   243→   243→   243→            raise BrowserError(f"No new tab opened within {timeout}ms: {e}")
   244→   244→   244→   244→
   245→   245→   245→   245→    def switch_to_primary_tab(self) -> Page:
   246→   246→   246→   246→        """Switch back to the original (primary) tab."""
   247→   247→   247→   247→        if not self._primary_page or self._primary_page.is_closed():
   248→   248→   248→   248→            raise BrowserError("Primary tab is not available")
   249→   249→   249→   249→
   250→   250→   250→   250→        self._page = self._primary_page
   251→   251→   251→   251→        logger.debug(f"Switched to primary tab: {self._page.url}")
   252→   252→   252→   252→        return self._page
   253→   253→   253→   253→
   254→   254→   254→   254→    async def close_current_tab(self) -> Page:
   255→   255→   255→   255→        """Close the current active tab and switch to the previous one."""
   256→   256→   256→   256→        if not self._page:
   257→   257→   257→   257→            raise BrowserError("No active page to close")
   258→   258→   258→   258→
   259→   259→   259→   259→        if self._page == self._primary_page:
   260→   260→   260→   260→            raise BrowserError("Cannot close the primary tab")
   261→   261→   261→   261→
   262→   262→   262→   262→        closing = self._page
   263→   263→   263→   263→        try:
   264→   264→   264→   264→            if closing in self._opened_tabs:
   265→   265→   265→   265→                self._opened_tabs.remove(closing)
   266→   266→   266→   266→            await closing.close()
   267→   267→   267→   267→        except Exception as e:
   268→   268→   268→   268→            logger.warning(f"Error closing tab: {e}")
   269→   269→   269→   269→
   270→   270→   270→   270→        if self._context and self._context.pages:
   271→   271→   271→   271→            self._page = self._context.pages[-1]
   272→   272→   272→   272→        else:
   273→   273→   273→   273→            self._page = self._primary_page
   274→   274→   274→   274→
   275→   275→   275→   275→        logger.debug(f"Closed tab, switched to: {self._page.url if self._page else 'none'}")
   276→   276→   276→   276→        return self._page
   277→   277→   277→   277→
   278→   278→   278→   278→    async def save_session(self) -> None:
   279→   279→   279→   279→        """Save current session to disk (backup of cookies)."""
   280→   280→   280→   280→        if self._context:
   281→   281→   281→   281→            await self._session_manager.save(self._context)
   282→   282→   282→   282→        else:
   283→   283→   283→   283→            logger.warning("No active context to save session from")
   284→   284→   284→   284→
   285→   285→   285→   285→    async def screenshot(self, name: str = None) -> str:
   286→   286→   286→   286→        """Take a screenshot of current page."""
   287→   287→   287→   287→        if not self._page:
   288→   288→   288→   288→            raise BrowserError("No active page for screenshot")
   289→   289→   289→   289→
   290→   290→   290→   290→        screenshot_dir = Path(self._config.get('data.screenshot_dir', 'data/screenshots'))
   291→   291→   291→   291→        screenshot_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   292→   292→   292→   292→
   293→   293→   293→   293→        if name is None:
   294→   294→   294→   294→            name = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   295→   295→   295→   295→
   296→   296→   296→   296→        filepath = screenshot_dir / f"{name}.png"
   297→   297→   297→   297→
   298→   298→   298→   298→        await self._page.screenshot(path=str(filepath), full_page=True)
   299→   299→   299→   299→        logger.info(f"Screenshot saved: {filepath}")
   300→   300→   300→   300→
   301→   301→   301→   301→        return str(filepath)
   302→   302→   302→   302→
   303→   303→   303→   303→
   304→   304→   304→   304→# Global browser manager instance
   305→   305→   305→   305→_browser_manager: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
   306→   306→   306→   306→
   307→   307→   307→   307→
   308→   308→   308→   308→def get_browser_manager() -> BrowserManager:
   309→   309→   309→   309→    """Get global browser manager instance."""
   310→   310→   310→   310→    global _browser_manager
   311→   311→   311→   311→    if _browser_manager is None:
   312→   312→   312→   312→        _browser_manager = BrowserManager()
   313→   313→   313→   313→    return _browser_manager
   314→   314→   314→   314→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Profile extraction module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Extracts candidate profile information from Boss直聘.
     4→     4→     4→     4→
     5→     5→     5→     5→CRITICAL LIMITATION (verified 2026-03-03):
     6→     6→     6→     6→Profile details in the resume overlay are wasm-rendered — the DOM inside
     7→     7→     7→     7→.resume-detail-wrap is empty. We CANNOT extract detailed resume via DOM.
     8→     8→     8→     8→
     9→     9→     9→     9→Profile data sources:
    10→    10→    10→    10→1. Search card data (from searchFrame iframe) — best source for basic info
    11→    11→    11→    11→2. Resume overlay header/footer — job position, contact status
    12→    12→    12→    12→3. Chat page conversation — limited info
    13→    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→    14→The extract_profile function now primarily uses search card data
    15→    15→    15→    15→and supplements with whatever is available from the resume overlay.
    16→    16→    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→    18→from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    19→    19→    19→    19→
    20→    20→    20→    20→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    21→    21→    21→    21→from loguru import logger
    22→    22→    22→    22→from rich.console import Console
    23→    23→    23→    23→from rich.panel import Panel
    24→    24→    24→    24→
    25→    25→    25→    25→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    26→    26→    26→    26→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    27→    27→    27→    27→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    28→    28→    28→    28→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha

    30→    30→    30→    30→from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager

    33→    33→    33→    33→console = Console()
    34→    34→    34→    34→
    35→    35→    35→    35→
    36→    36→    36→    36→# JavaScript extraction for candidate profile from search card (inside searchFrame iframe).
    37→    37→    37→    37→# This extracts all available data from the card since resume detail is wasm-rendered.
    38→    38→    38→    38→EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS = """
    39→    39→    39→    39→(expectId) => {
    40→    40→    40→    40→    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
    41→    41→    41→    41→    if (!link) return null;
    42→    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    43→    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
    44→    44→    44→    44→    if (!card) return null;
    45→    45→    45→    45→
    46→    46→    46→    46→    const result = {
    47→    47→    47→    47→        name: '',
    48→    48→    48→    48→        title: '',
    49→    49→    49→    49→        company: '',
    50→    50→    50→    50→        location: '',
    51→    51→    51→    51→        salary_expect: '',
    52→    52→    52→    52→        work_years: '',
    53→    53→    53→    53→        education_level: '',
    54→    54→    54→    54→        basic_info: {},
    55→    55→    55→    55→        education: [],
    56→    56→    56→    56→        work_experience: [],
    57→    57→    57→    57→        skills: []
    58→    58→    58→    58→    };
    59→    59→    59→    59→
    60→    60→    60→    60→    // Name
    61→    61→    61→    61→    const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
    62→    62→    62→    62→    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63→    63→    63→    63→
    64→    64→    64→    64→    // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
    65→    65→    65→    65→    const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
    66→    66→    66→    66→    const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
    67→    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→    68→    for (const text of infoTexts) {
    69→    69→    69→    69→        if (text.includes('岁')) {
    70→    70→    70→    70→            result.basic_info.age = text;
    71→    71→    71→    71→        } else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) {
    72→    72→    72→    72→            result.work_years = text;
    73→    73→    73→    73→            result.basic_info.work_years = text;
    74→    74→    74→    74→        } else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) {
    75→    75→    75→    75→            result.education_level = text;
    76→    76→    76→    76→            result.basic_info.education = text;
    77→    77→    77→    77→        } else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) {
    78→    78→    78→    78→            result.basic_info.job_status = text;
    79→    79→    79→    79→        } else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k')) {
    80→    80→    80→    80→            result.salary_expect = text;
    81→    81→    81→    81→        }
    82→    82→    82→    82→    }
    83→    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    84→    // Active status
    85→    85→    85→    85→    const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
    86→    86→    86→    86→    if (activeEl) result.basic_info.active_status = activeEl.innerText.trim();
    87→    87→    87→    87→
    88→    88→    88→    88→    // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
    89→    89→    89→    89→    const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
    90→    90→    90→    90→    result.basic_info.labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    91→    91→    91→    91→
    92→    92→    92→    92→    // Self description
    93→    93→    93→    93→    const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
    94→    94→    94→    94→    if (detailEl) result.basic_info.self_description = detailEl.innerText.trim();
    95→    95→    95→    95→
    96→    96→    96→    96→    // Expect city
    97→    97→    97→    97→    const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
    98→    98→    98→    98→    result.location = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    99→    99→    99→    99→
   100→   100→   100→   100→    // Work experience
   101→   101→   101→   101→    const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   102→   102→   102→   102→    const workTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   103→   103→   103→   103→    if (workTexts.length >= 1) {
   104→   104→   104→   104→        result.company = workTexts[0];
   105→   105→   105→   105→        result.title = workTexts[1] || '';
   106→   106→   106→   106→        result.work_experience.push({
   107→   107→   107→   107→            company: workTexts[0],
   108→   108→   108→   108→            title: workTexts[1] || ''
   109→   109→   109→   109→        });
   110→   110→   110→   110→    }
   111→   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→   112→    // Education
   113→   113→   113→   113→    const eduEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   114→   114→   114→   114→    const eduTexts = Array.from(eduEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   115→   115→   115→   115→    if (eduTexts.length >= 1) {
   116→   116→   116→   116→        result.education.push({
   117→   117→   117→   117→            school: eduTexts[0],
   118→   118→   118→   118→            major: eduTexts[1] || ''
   119→   119→   119→   119→        });
   120→   120→   120→   120→    }
   121→   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→   122→    // Elite flag
   123→   123→   123→   123→    result.basic_info.is_elite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   124→   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→   125→    return result;
   126→   126→   126→   126→}
   127→   127→   127→   127→"""
   128→   128→   128→   128→
   129→   129→   129→   129→
   130→   130→   130→   130→# JavaScript extraction for resume overlay (main page DOM).
   131→   131→   131→   131→# Limited data since resume content is wasm-rendered.
   132→   132→   132→   132→EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS = """
   133→   133→   133→   133→() => {
   134→   134→   134→   134→    const dialog = document.querySelector('.dialog-wrap.active .dialog-lib-resume');
   135→   135→   135→   135→    if (!dialog) return null;
   136→   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→   137→    const result = {};
   138→   138→   138→   138→
   139→   139→   139→   139→    // Position info from footer
   140→   140→   140→   140→    const positionEl = dialog.querySelector('.position-name');
   141→   141→   141→   141→    if (positionEl) result.chat_position = positionEl.innerText.trim();
   142→   142→   142→   142→
   143→   143→   143→   143→    // Chat history from right panel
   144→   144→   144→   144→    const historyEls = dialog.querySelectorAll('.chat-history-process .action');
   145→   145→   145→   145→    result.chat_history = Array.from(historyEls).slice(0, 5).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   146→   146→   146→   146→
   147→   147→   147→   147→    // Contact button text
   148→   148→   148→   148→    const contactBtn = dialog.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   149→   149→   149→   149→    if (contactBtn) result.contact_status = contactBtn.innerText.trim();
   150→   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→   151→    return result;
   152→   152→   152→   152→}
   153→   153→   153→   153→"""
   154→   154→   154→   154→
   155→   155→   155→   155→
   156→   156→   156→   156→async def extract_profile(
   157→   157→   157→   157→    boss_id: str,
   158→   158→   158→   158→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   159→   159→   159→   159→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   160→   160→   160→   160→    """
   161→   161→   161→   161→    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   162→   162→   162→   162→
   163→   163→   163→   163→    Uses search card data as the primary source since the resume
   164→   164→   164→   164→    overlay is wasm-rendered and has empty DOM.
   165→   165→   165→   165→
   166→   166→   166→   166→    Args:
   167→   167→   167→   167→        boss_id: Boss直聘 candidate ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   168→   168→   168→   168→        browser: Browser manager instance
   169→   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→   170→    Returns:
   171→   171→   171→   171→        Dictionary with profile data
   172→   172→   172→   172→
   173→   173→   173→   173→    Raises:
   174→   174→   174→   174→        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   175→   175→   175→   175→    """
   176→   176→   176→   176→    if browser is None:
   177→   177→   177→   177→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   178→   178→   178→   178→
   179→   179→   179→   179→    page = browser.page
   180→   180→   180→   180→    if not page:
   181→   181→   181→   181→        page = await browser.start()
   182→   182→   182→   182→
   183→   183→   183→   183→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   184→   184→   184→   184→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   185→   185→   185→   185→
   186→   186→   186→   186→    # Rate limit check
   187→   187→   187→   187→    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   188→   188→   188→   188→
   189→   189→   189→   189→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   190→   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→   191→    try:
   192→   192→   192→   192→        profile_data = None
   193→   193→   193→   193→
   194→   194→   194→   194→        # Strategy 1: Extract from search card in iframe (best source)
   195→   195→   195→   195→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   196→   196→   196→   196→        if not search_frame:
   197→   197→   197→   197→            for f in page.frames:
   198→   198→   198→   198→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   199→   199→   199→   199→                    search_frame = f
   200→   200→   200→   200→                    break
   201→   201→   201→   201→
   202→   202→   202→   202→        if search_frame:
   203→   203→   203→   203→            profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   204→   204→   204→   204→
   205→   205→   205→   205→        # Strategy 2: If not on search page, navigate there
   206→   206→   206→   206→        if not profile_data:
   207→   207→   207→   207→            await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   208→   208→   208→   208→                                   wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   209→   209→   209→   209→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   210→   210→   210→   210→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   211→   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→   212→            search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   213→   213→   213→   213→            if not search_frame:
   214→   214→   214→   214→                for f in page.frames:
   215→   215→   215→   215→                    if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   216→   216→   216→   216→                        search_frame = f
   217→   217→   217→   217→                        break
   218→   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→   219→            if search_frame:
   220→   220→   220→   220→                profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   221→   221→   221→   221→
   222→   222→   222→   222→        # Strategy 3: Use database data as fallback
   223→   223→   223→   223→        if not profile_data:
   224→   224→   224→   224→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   225→   225→   225→   225→                candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   226→   226→   226→   226→                if candidate:
   227→   227→   227→   227→                    profile_data = {
   228→   228→   228→   228→                        'name': candidate.name or '',
   229→   229→   229→   229→                        'title': candidate.title or '',
   230→   230→   230→   230→                        'company': candidate.company or '',
   231→   231→   231→   231→                        'location': candidate.location or '',
   232→   232→   232→   232→                        'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect or '',
   233→   233→   233→   233→                        'work_years': candidate.work_years or '',
   234→   234→   234→   234→                        'education_level': candidate.education_level or '',
   235→   235→   235→   235→                        'basic_info': candidate.basic_info or {},
   236→   236→   236→   236→                        'education': candidate.education or [],
   237→   237→   237→   237→                        'work_experience': candidate.work_experience or [],
   238→   238→   238→   238→                        'skills': candidate.skills or [],
   239→   239→   239→   239→                    }
   240→   240→   240→   240→
   241→   241→   241→   241→        if not profile_data:
   242→   242→   242→   242→            raise ExtractionError(f"No profile data found for {boss_id}")
   243→   243→   243→   243→
   244→   244→   244→   244→        # Try to supplement with overlay data (if resume dialog is open)
   245→   245→   245→   245→        try:
   246→   246→   246→   246→            overlay_data = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS)
   247→   247→   247→   247→            if overlay_data:
   248→   248→   248→   248→                profile_data.setdefault('basic_info', {})
   249→   249→   249→   249→                if overlay_data.get('chat_position'):
   250→   250→   250→   250→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_position'] = overlay_data['chat_position']
   251→   251→   251→   251→                if overlay_data.get('contact_status'):
   252→   252→   252→   252→                    profile_data['basic_info']['contact_status'] = overlay_data['contact_status']
   253→   253→   253→   253→                if overlay_data.get('chat_history'):
   254→   254→   254→   254→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_history'] = overlay_data['chat_history']
   255→   255→   255→   255→        except Exception:
   256→   256→   256→   256→            pass  # Overlay data is supplementary, not critical
   257→   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→   258→        # Log action
   259→   259→   259→   259→        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   260→   260→   260→   260→
   261→   261→   261→   261→        # Update database
   262→   262→   262→   262→        _update_profile_in_db(boss_id, profile_data, db_manager)
   263→   263→   263→   263→
   264→   264→   264→   264→        # Display profile
   265→   265→   265→   265→        _display_profile(boss_id, profile_data)
   266→   266→   266→   266→
   267→   267→   267→   267→        return profile_data
   268→   268→   268→   268→
   269→   269→   269→   269→    except ExtractionError:

   276→   276→   276→   276→def _update_profile_in_db(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict, db_manager) -> None:
   277→   277→   277→   277→    """Update candidate profile in the database."""
   278→   278→   278→   278→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   279→   279→   279→   279→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   280→   280→   280→   280→
   281→   281→   281→   281→        if not candidate:
   282→   282→   282→   282→            candidate = Candidate(boss_id=boss_id)
   283→   283→   283→   283→            session.add(candidate)
   284→   284→   284→   284→
   285→   285→   285→   285→        # Update fields
   286→   286→   286→   286→        candidate.name = profile_data.get('name') or candidate.name
   287→   287→   287→   287→        candidate.title = profile_data.get('title') or candidate.title
   288→   288→   288→   288→        candidate.company = profile_data.get('company') or candidate.company
   289→   289→   289→   289→        candidate.location = profile_data.get('location') or candidate.location
   290→   290→   290→   290→        candidate.salary_expect = profile_data.get('salary_expect') or candidate.salary_expect
   291→   291→   291→   291→        candidate.work_years = profile_data.get('work_years') or candidate.work_years
   292→   292→   292→   292→        candidate.education_level = profile_data.get('education_level') or candidate.education_level
   293→   293→   293→   293→        candidate.basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info')
   294→   294→   294→   294→        candidate.education = profile_data.get('education')
   295→   295→   295→   295→        candidate.work_experience = profile_data.get('work_experience')
   296→   296→   296→   296→        candidate.skills = profile_data.get('skills')
   297→   297→   297→   297→
